This essay argues that the overuse is a trained disposition, driven mainly by a training distribution rich in promotional prose and by preference tuning (RLHF) that rewards confident, emphatic phrasing; the left-to-right nature of generation is an amplifier rather than the root cause. Building on evidence that models diverge from human rhetorical style, and on Fontanier's classification of epanorthosis as a figure of thought, it sets out a programme that scores the figure against genre-specific human baselines through an Epanorthosis Index (density relative to the human rate). A first measurement, on three sizes of one instruction-tuned model family, finds mis-calibration by register in both directions: the models overshoot in oratory (about twofold, near threefold in Italian, concentrated in the larger tiers) and undershoot in informal question-and-answer writing, while matching humans in argument, journalism, and encyclopedic prose. Three constructive contributions follow: a survey of mitigation techniques centred on lightweight LoRA adapters; a demonstration, in Italian, that a one-line instruction cuts the figure by half to nearly three-quarters and that a supervised-fine-tuning adapter removes it almost entirely, with a scaling coefficient that dials the reduction back onto the human rate; and the argument that the target is calibration to the human rate for each genre, not elimination. It closes on the stakes: the real risk is that we begin to write like the machines.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大型语言模型系统性过度使用修辞格"epanorthosis（自我修正）"，主要源于训练数据中的促销文本和RLHF偏好调优，而非自回归生成机制。通过提出"Epanorthosis Index"进行跨体裁校准测量，并展示LoRA适配器和单行指令可将该修辞使用率降低至人类水平，论证目标是按体裁校准而非完全消除。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型生成的文本中系统性过度出现一种古代修辞格"epanorthosis（自我修正）"，例如"This is not a course. It is a journey of transformation"，这种过度使用使得模型文本在修辞风格上与人类显著偏离，且不同体裁下的偏离方向和程度各不相同（如正式演说中过度使用、非正式问答中使用不足），需要进行系统性的测量和校准。
AI.method: 本文首先从理论层面论证epanorthosis过度使用的主因是训练数据中的促销性文本和RLHF偏好调优（奖励自信、强调性的措辞），左到右自回归生成只是放大器而非根本原因。基于Fontanier将该修辞归为思想修辞格的分类法，提出Epanorthosis Index（密度相对于人类基线率的比值）用于跨体裁评分。在缓解方面，探索了轻量级LoRA适配器、单行指令（在意大利语中测试）以及监督微调适配器加缩放系数的方法。
AI.result: 在三个规模的指令微调模型家族上的首次测量发现，模型在演说体裁中过度使用epanorthosis（约两倍，意大利语中近三倍，集中在较大模型层级），在非正式问答写作中使用不足，而在论证性文本、新闻和百科全书式散文中与人类匹配。意大利语实验中，单行指令可将该修辞减少一半至近四分之三，监督微调适配器几乎完全消除，配合缩放系数可调回人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 核心结论是目标应为按体裁校准到人类基线的修辞使用率，而非完全消除epanorthosis。真正的风险不是机器模仿人类修辞，而是人类开始像机器那样写作。研究贡献包括提出了系统化的修辞过度使用测量框架、多种缓解技术（LoRA适配器、指令调控、微调适配器+缩放系数），以及强调了修辞校准而非消除的规范立场。

title: Do Pathology Vision-Language Models Truly See Pathology?
summary: Pathology vision-language models (VLMs) have recently progressed rapidly and are commonly evaluated by answer accuracy on pathology VQA benchmarks. However, we dig into current evaluations and identify three overlooked issues: 1) Visual evidence is not always necessary. For instance, Gemini-3-Pro achieves 53.5% average accuracy across 5 VQA benchmarks without any visual input. 2) Domain training can improve accuracy without proportional gains in visual binding. Compared with Qwen2.5-VL-7B, Patho-R1-7B exhibits a 5.8-point lower multimodal gain and a 3.7-point lower attention IoU. 3) Entity-level attention is diffuse and weakly query-specific. On PathVG, attention maps remain highly correlated across different entity queries. These issues can lead to substantial misjudgments of pathology VLMs' actual multimodal capabilities. To this end, we present PathBind, a benchmark comprising 2,600 samples: PathBind-VQA with 1,500 questions across six dimensions, PathBind-PTA with 600 questions from a private pathology teaching atlas, and PathBind-Grounding with 500 expert-curated region-level samples. Each component undergoes task-specific automated filtering and expert review to reduce textual shortcuts and improve entity-region correspondence. We evaluate 18 representative VLMs on VQA samples of PathBind and five existing pathology VQA benchmarks, and further evaluate 10 VLMs on PathBind-Grounding and PathVG. Results show that current pathology VLMs still exhibit a substantial gap between answer-side performance and visual-semantic binding.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前病理视觉语言模型评估存在三大被忽视的问题（视觉非必要性、领域训练与视觉绑定脱节、注意力分散），并提出PathBind基准（含2600样本、三个子集）来更准确地评估VLMs的多模态能力，实验表明现有病理VLMs在答案准确性与视觉-语义绑定之间存在显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有病理VLM评估主要依赖病理VQA基准的答案准确率，但该方法存在三个被忽视的关键问题：1) 视觉输入并非总是必要的（如Gemini-3-Pro无视觉输入仍达53.5%平均准确率）；2) 领域训练能在不按比例提升视觉绑定的情况下提高准确率；3) 实体级注意力分散且缺乏查询特异性。这些问题可能导致对病理VLM实际多模态能力的严重误判。
AI.method: 提出PathBind基准，包含2600个样本，分为三个子集：PathBind-VQA（1500个问题，覆盖六个维度）、PathBind-PTA（600个问题，来自私有病理教学图谱）、PathBind-Grounding（500个专家精选的区域级样本）。每个子集经过任务特定的自动过滤和专家审查，以减少文本捷径并增强实体-区域对应关系。在VQA样本上评估了18个代表性VLM，并在PathBind-Grounding和PathVG上进一步评估了10个VLM。
AI.result: 在PathBind及五个现有病理VQA基准上评估18个VLM，并在PathBind-Grounding和PathVG上评估10个VLM，结果显示当前病理VLM在答案侧表现与视觉-语义绑定之间存在显著差距。具体发现包括：Qwen2.5-VL-7B相比，Patho-R1-7B的多模态增益低5.8个百分点，注意力IoU低3.7个百分点；PathVG上不同实体查询的注意力图高度相关，表明注意力分散且缺乏查询特异性。
AI.conclusion: 现有病理VLM尽管在答案准确率上表现良好，但在视觉-语义绑定能力上仍存在显著不足，现有的基于VQA准确率的评估方式无法有效反映模型真正的多模态理解水平。PathBind为更全面、更可靠地评估病理VLM的多模态能力提供了新的基准工具。

title: MKEvolve: A Modular Multi-Agent Framework for Kernel Code Generation
summary: Despite rapid progress in LLM-based code generation, writing correct and performant kernels for hardware accelerators remains a key bottleneck in scaling modern ML workloads. We present MKEvolve (Modular Kernel Evolve), a framework that iteratively co-evolves a modular decomposition of complex PyTorch modules and the LLM-generated kernel for each submodule, refining the decomposition by splitting and fusing across iterations while independently improving each subkernel via LLM-driven beam search. The resulting kernels are programmatic compositions of independently verified subkernels, making them configurable (subkernel implementations are swappable), interpretable (errors and speedups are traceable to specific subkernels), and readily adaptable to related model architectures. Experiments with Triton on KernelBench L2 and L3, spanning multi-operator sequences and full model architectures, show that MKEvolve improves both correctness and speedup over end-to-end direct synthesis baselines while reducing LLM token usage by up to 35%.

AI.tldr: MKEvolve是一个迭代式协同进化框架，通过模块化分解复杂PyTorch模块并独立优化LLM生成的子内核，实现了可配置、可解释且易于适配的内核组合，在Triton KernelBench L2/L3上相比端到端合成基线提升了正确性与加速比，并降低LLM token用量达35%。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的代码生成虽有快速进展，但在硬件加速器上编写正确且高性能的内核仍是扩展现代机器学习工作负载的关键瓶颈，现有端到端直接合成方法在复杂多算子序列和完整模型架构上难以同时保证正确性和性能。
AI.method: MKEvolve提出迭代式协同进化框架，将复杂PyTorch模块分解为多个子模块，每个子模块独立生成LLM驱动的内核；在迭代过程中通过分裂与融合操作动态优化模块分解结构，并利用LLM驱动的束搜索（beam search）独立改进每个子内核的性能与正确性。
AI.result: 在Triton KernelBench L2（多算子序列）和L3（完整模型架构）基准上，MKEvolve相比端到端直接合成基线在正确率和加速比上均有显著提升，同时将LLM token使用量降低了高达35%。
AI.conclusion: 通过程序化的子内核组合，MKEvolve生成的内核具备可配置性（子内核实现可替换）、可解释性（错误和加速可追溯至特定子内核）以及良好的架构适应性，为大规模LLM驱动的高性能内核生成提供了模块化、可维护的新范式。

title: Show, Don't Tell: Evaluating Spatial Cognition in Generative Pixels Rather Than LLM Text
summary: Spatial intelligence is essential for agents to move from static semantic understanding toward interacting with the physical world. Many spatial tasks are grounded in continuous visual scenes, where locations, regions, and paths are more naturally expressed by pointing, marking, or drawing than by reporting precise coordinates or discrete textual symbols. Yet existing spatial reasoning benchmarks usually require coordinates, options, or text, creating an answer-interface mismatch for image-generation models. This makes it difficult to evaluate image-generation models under the same task semantics as text-output VLMs, despite their ability to externalize spatial judgments directly in pixel space. We propose ProVisE (Protocolized Visual Evaluation), a benchmark-agnostic framework that elicits protocol-constrained visual answers from image-generation models and parses them into structured predictions compatible with original metrics. ProVisE also includes an Agentic builder that constructs and validates task-specific protocols for new benchmarks. We further introduce SpatialGen-Bench, a curated diagnostic benchmark of 470 samples across 14 spatial subtasks, four capability levels, and diverse answer forms. We evaluate representative text-output VLMs and image-generation models in a unified setting and validate Agentic protocol construction on six external spatial benchmarks. Results show that image-generation models are competitive when spatial answers can be externalized directly in pixel space, while text-output VLMs retain a clear advantage in compositional spatial reasoning. These findings reveal complementary strengths of pixel-space expression and text-based reasoning and establish a metric-compatible testbed for studying spatial cognition in image-generation models.

AI.tldr: 提出ProVisE框架，通过协议约束的视觉答案解析使图像生成模型能够与文本输出VLM在统一的空间推理任务语义下进行评估；同时构建SpatialGen-Bench诊断基准，揭示像素空间表达与文本推理在空间智能上的互补优势。
AI.motivation: 现有空间推理基准通常要求坐标、选项或文本形式的答案，导致与图像生成模型天然适合的像素空间表达之间存在接口不匹配，难以在同一任务语义下公平比较图像生成模型与文本输出VLM的空间推理能力。
AI.method: 提出ProVisE（Protocolized Visual Evaluation）框架，通过协议约束从图像生成模型中获取视觉答案并解析为与原始评测指标兼容的结构化预测；框架包含Agentic Builder，可自动构造并验证面向新基准的任务特定协议。同时构建SpatialGen-Bench诊断基准，包含470个样本、14个空间子任务、四个能力层级和多样化答案形式。
AI.result: 在统一设置下评测了代表性文本输出VLM和图像生成模型，并在六个外部空间基准上验证了Agentic协议构造的有效性。结果表明，当空间答案可直接在像素空间中表达时，图像生成模型具有竞争力；而在组合性空间推理任务上，文本输出VLM保持明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 像素空间表达与文本推理在空间智能任务上展现出互补优势：图像生成模型擅于直接在视觉空间中外化空间判断，而文本输出VLM则强于组合性推理。该工作建立了支持度量兼容的图像生成模型空间认知研究测试平台。

title: LeanFlow: A Case Study in Workflow-Driven Lean Autoformalization
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures, ICML 2026: AI for Math Workshop
summary: We present and evaluate LeanFlow, an LLM agent system specialized for translating mathematical papers into buildable Lean projects. Recent verifier-in-the-loop systems show that large formal artifacts can be produced, but it remains unclear which runtime mechanisms affect completion, auditability, or efficiency in document-to-project formalization. We study this question through case studies on two previously unformalized mathematical papers in number theory and measure theory, using model, proof-workflow, and toolset ablations with Kimi2.6 and GPT5.5; we report task outcome, API calls, input tokens, and output tokens. With Kimi2.6, the full workflow completes both document-level projects within the 2000-call budget, while no-queue variants reach the budget limit; with GPT5.5, all document-level variants complete, and the full workflow has the lowest or tied-lowest input-token cost on both sources. As complementary calibration, LeanFlow reaches 75.7% BEq+ on the PFR slice of RLM25 and solves all five ICML 2026 AI for Math TCS challenge projects in our GPT5.5 runs.

AI.tldr: 提出并评估了LeanFlow，一个专门用于将数学论文翻译为可构建Lean项目的LLM代理系统，通过消融实验和跨模型对比（Kimi2.6与GPT5.5）验证了运行时机制（如队列管理）对任务完成率、审计性和效率的关键影响，并在多项基准上取得了领先结果。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的验证器在环系统已能生成大型形式化产物，但在文档到项目的形式化过程中，哪些运行时机制会影响任务完成率、可审计性或效率仍不清楚，缺乏系统的实验研究。
AI.method: 提出了LeanFlow，一个基于LLM代理的系统，专门用于将数学论文翻译为可构建的Lean项目；通过在数论和测度论两篇未形式化的论文上进行案例研究，采用模型（Kimi2.6与GPT5.5）、证明工作流和工具集的消融实验，并报告任务结果、API调用次数、输入token数和输出token数来评估系统性能。
AI.result: Kimi2.6下完整工作流在2000次调用预算内完成两个文档级项目，而无队列变体达到预算上限；GPT5.5下所有文档级变体均完成，且完整工作流在两个源上的输入token成本最低或并列最低；LeanFlow在RLM25的PFR子集上达到75.7% BEq+，并在GPT5.5运行中解决了ICML 2026 AI for Math TCS挑战赛的全部五个项目。
AI.conclusion: LeanFlow证明了LLM代理系统在数学论文到Lean项目的全文档形式化中的可行性和效率，揭示了队列管理等运行时机制对任务完成和资源消耗的关键作用，为大规模形式化数学提供了可复现的工程范式。

title: HiMe: Real-Time Self-Hosted Personal Agent Platform for Health Insights with Wearable Devices
summary: Traditional approaches to wearable health signal analysis, such as smartwatches, are constrained by rigid analytical frameworks and limited personalisation. The emergence of LLM agents creates a new opportunity for Personal Health Agentic Analysis, where health insights can be generated adaptively and in context. However, currently there is no open-source locally deployable platform capable of processing personal health data in real time while preserving privacy. We present HiMe, a locally deployable, privacy-first agent platform that is fully compatible with real-time health data ecosystems across a wide range of wearable devices. HiMe is guided by three design principles. The database is treated as a first-class component. Effectiveness and efficiency are jointly optimised to achieve a low-cost Pareto-optimal balance. Data are processed in real time while the user is modelled over the long term. Together, these principles make it practical for individuals to harness Personal Health Agents for continuous, personalised health monitoring for better wellbeing.

AI.tldr: HiMe是一个本地可部署、隐私优先的智能体平台，支持实时处理可穿戴设备健康数据，通过将数据库视为一等组件、联合优化效率与有效性达到帕累托最优平衡、实时处理数据与长期用户建模相结合三大设计原则，实现持续、个性化的健康监测。
AI.motivation: 传统的可穿戴健康信号分析方法受限于僵化的分析框架和有限的个性化能力，虽然大语言模型智能体为自适应、上下文相关的个人健康分析带来了新机遇，但目前缺乏一个开源、可本地部署、能在保护隐私的同时实时处理个人健康数据的平台。
AI.method: HiMe是一个本地可部署的隐私优先智能体平台，完全兼容多种可穿戴设备的实时健康数据生态系统。平台遵循三大设计原则：将数据库视为一等组件；联合优化有效性与效率以实现低成本的帕累托最优平衡；在实时处理数据的同时对用户进行长期建模。
AI.result: HiMe通过将数据库作为一等组件、联合优化有效性与效率实现低成本帕累托最优平衡、结合实时数据处理与长期用户建模，使得个人能够利用个人健康智能体进行持续、个性化的健康监测，从而改善健康福祉。
AI.conclusion: HiMe证明了在保护隐私的前提下，通过本地部署的开源平台实现实时、个性化的可穿戴健康数据分析是可行的。其设计原则为个人健康智能体分析领域提供了实用的技术路线，使持续健康监测从概念走向实际应用。

title: C-PTQ: Fisher-weighted Channel-wise Sensitivity for Post-training Quantization of MLLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) require huge memory and computational costs, which limits their practical deployment. Post-training quantization (PTQ) techniques offer an efficient solution for model compression and inference acceleration. Yet, the quantized model faces performance degradation due to outlier channels, which are highly sensitive to quantization and substantially impair activation fidelity and task accuracy. To protect these salient channels during quantization, existing PTQ methods leverage modality- or token-level metrics to guide channel-wise scaling (CWS) of LLM decoders. However, these orthogonal measurements fail to capture channel-wise impacts on task-specific loss, and the misalignment between importance and scaling factors ultimately leads to suboptimal performance. To address this issue, we propose C-PTQ, a unified channel-wise PTQ method that harmonizes task-specific loss perturbation and quantization error. Motivated by second-order derivatives, we design a Fisher-weighted objective as a tractable Hessian approximation, seamlessly injecting task sensitivity into the scaling process. Notably, we achieve state-of-the-art performance without auxiliary modules like LoRA, thereby maintaining high efficiency. Experiments on Qwen2.5VL, InternVL2 and LLaVA-OV across 8 benchmarks demonstrate our effectiveness in both weight-only and weight-activation settings.

AI.tldr: 提出C-PTQ，一种基于Fisher加权的统一通道级后训练量化方法，通过将任务特定损失扰动与量化误差对齐，在不依赖LoRA等辅助模块的情况下实现多模态大语言模型的高效量化，在多个MLLM和基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）存在巨大的内存和计算开销，限制了实际部署。后训练量化（PTQ）虽能压缩模型并加速推理，但量化后的模型因异常通道（对量化高度敏感）而面临性能下降。现有PTQ方法在LLM解码器中利用模态级或令牌级指标引导通道级缩放（CWS）来保护这些通道，但这些正交度量无法捕捉通道级对任务特定损失的影响，导致重要性与缩放因子之间的错配，性能欠佳。
AI.method: 提出C-PTQ，一种统一的通道级后训练量化方法，旨在协调任务特定损失扰动与量化误差。受二阶导数启发，设计Fisher加权目标作为可处理的Hessian近似，将任务敏感性无缝注入通道级缩放过程。该方法无需LoRA等辅助模块，在保持高效性的同时实现量化。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5VL、InternVL2和LLaVA-OV三个MLLM上，覆盖8个基准测试，在权重量化和权重-激活量化两种设置下均取得最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: C-PTQ通过Fisher信息矩阵将任务损失信息引入量化缩放因子，有效解决了重要性度量与缩放因子的对齐问题，在不增加额外模块的前提下显著提升了量化MLLM的性能，为MLLM的高效部署提供了实用方案。

title: MiniCache: Reusable Program Caching with Small Model Interfaces for Efficient LLM Inference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for program-aided reasoning, agentic decision making, and structured task execution, but these applications often incur high inference cost. We present MiniCache, a reusable program caching framework that transforms Program-of-Thought (PoT) programs into parameterized cache objects, enabling reusable computation across structurally similar requests. MiniCache reuses the same small model for semantic variable extraction on cache-hit requests and speculative drafting during target-LLM generation, reducing expensive target-LLM invocations while preserving task quality. Experiments on shopping-style request datasets, WebShop, Formula, and CodeTAT-QA demonstrate that MiniCache improves the trade-off between inference latency, cache reuse, and accuracy, achieving up to 3.1x lower latency and 2.8x higher throughput under parallel serving. These results show that small models are most effective not as replacements for large models, but as lightweight interface models that enable reliable and efficient reusable program caching.

AI.tldr: MiniCache是一个将Program-of-Thought程序转化为参数化缓存对象的可复用程序缓存框架，通过小模型进行语义变量提取和推测性草稿生成，在购物类请求、WebShop、Formula和CodeTAT-QA数据集上实现最高3.1倍延迟降低和2.8倍吞吐量提升，表明小模型更适合作为轻量级接口模型而非大模型的替代品。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在程序辅助推理、智能体决策和结构化任务执行中的应用日益广泛，但这些场景通常面临高昂的推理成本，现有方法缺乏对结构相似请求之间可复用计算的有效利用。
AI.method: MiniCache提出了一种可复用程序缓存框架，将Program-of-Thought程序转化为参数化缓存对象，从而在结构相似的请求间实现计算复用；在缓存命中请求上，使用同一个小模型进行语义变量提取，并在目标大模型生成过程中执行推测性草稿生成，以减少昂贵的目标大模型调用次数同时保持任务质量。
AI.result: 在购物风格请求数据集、WebShop、Formula和CodeTAT-QA上的实验表明，MiniCache在推理延迟、缓存复用率和准确率之间实现了更好的权衡，在并行服务下最高可达到3.1倍的延迟降低和2.8倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明小模型最有效的用途不是作为大模型的替代品，而是作为轻量级接口模型，从而实现可靠且高效的可复用程序缓存。

title: OpenForgeRL: Train Harness-native Agents in Any Environment
summary: Modern AI agents rely on elaborate inference harnesses such as Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw to drive multi-turn reasoning, tool use, and access to external systems. While powerful, these complex harnesses also make agents hard to train end-to-end with open infrastructure, whose SFT/RL stacks cannot natively express stateful, multi-process harness inference. To address this, we present OpenForgeRL, an open-source framework for training harness-based agents end-to-end in diverse environments. OpenForgeRL achieves this with a lightweight proxy that serves the harness's model calls while recording them as training data for a standard RL codebase (e.g., veRL), and a Kubernetes orchestrator that runs each rollout in its own remote container, together enabling training on any harness in any environment at scale. By decoupling training and inference, OpenForgeRL allows researchers to easily train, study, and improve agents directly in the real harnesses and environments they are deployed with. We validate our framework across diverse, complex harnesses and environments, spanning tool/claw-based agents and multimodal GUI browser- and computer-use agents. Using only hundreds to a few thousand tasks, OpenForgeClaw reaches 31.7 pass^3 and 55.9 pass@3 on ClawEval and 33.7 on QwenClawBench. OpenForgeGUI reaches 37.7 on OSWorld-Verified, 63.0 on Online-Mind2Web, and 72.3 on WebVoyager. Both outperform open baselines of similar size on nearly all benchmarks, and in the GUI setting match or surpass models several times larger. Beyond benchmarks, we analyze how harness choice (e.g., ZeroClaw, OpenClaw, Codex) and RL shape agent behavior. We find that some harnesses are substantially harder to learn than others, and that RL improves agentic reliability, such as self-verification, tool coverage, and completing multi-step plans, though critical abilities such as error recovery remain weak.

AI.tldr: OpenForgeRL 是一个开源框架，通过轻量级代理和 Kubernetes 编排器将基于 harness 的 AI 代理与标准 RL 训练栈解耦，实现端到端训练，在工具/抓取和多模态 GUI 代理任务上显著超越开源基线，并系统分析了 harness 选择和 RL 对代理行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 现代 AI 代理依赖复杂的推理 harness（如 Claude Code、Codex、OpenClaw）实现多轮推理、工具调用和外部系统访问，但这些复杂 harness 导致代理难以在开放基础设施上进行端到端训练，因为现有的 SFT/RL 栈无法原生表达有状态的、多进程的 harness 推理过程。
AI.method: OpenForgeRL 提出轻量级代理（proxy）来接管 harness 的模型调用，同时将其记录为训练数据供标准 RL 代码库（如 veRL）使用；并采用 Kubernetes 编排器将每个 rollout 运行在独立的远程容器中，从而在任意环境和 harness 上实现可扩展训练，实现训练与推理的解耦。
AI.result: OpenForgeClaw 在 ClawEval 上达到 31.7 pass^3 和 55.9 pass@3，在 QwenClawBench 上达到 33.7；OpenForgeGUI 在 OSWorld-Verified 上达到 37.7，Online-Mind2Web 上 63.0，WebVoyager 上 72.3。两者在几乎所有基准上超越相似规模的开源基线，GUI 设置中匹配或超越数倍大小的模型。
AI.conclusion: 不同 harness 的学习难度差异显著；RL 能提升代理的可靠性，如自我验证、工具覆盖率和多步计划完成能力，但关键能力（如错误恢复）仍然薄弱。OpenForgeRL 使研究者能够直接在真实部署的 harness 和环境中训练和研究代理。

title: Causal-AgentIR: Self-Evolving Causal Memory for Adaptive Image Restoration Agents
summary:
Image restoration agents have recently emerged as a flexible paradigm for handling diverse and unpredictable degradations in real-world scenarios. Existing agents typically formulate restoration as a tool-using process, where the agent perceives degradations, searches candidate tools, executes restoration operations, and revises the plan through reflection or rollback. However, their knowledge is often stored as static tool descriptions, manually defined degradation priors, or unstructured textual summaries, which limits the accumulation, verification, revision, and forgetting of restoration knowledge over long-term experience. In this paper, we propose Causal-AgentIR, a hierarchical multi-agent framework with self-evolving causal memory for collective image restoration intelligence. Instead of representing restoration experience as isolated textual records, Causal-AgentIR organizes degradation patterns, image regions, restoration tools, actions, quality changes, and user preferences into a structured causal memory graph. This graph supports graph-based retrieval and multi-hop causal reasoning, enabling agents to infer how specific restoration operations or tool sequences affect restoration quality under different degradation conditions. The framework further organizes multiple agents into a collaborative system, including planning, degradation analysis, tool expertise, causal memory reasoning, outcome critique, and memory curation. Through this design, restoration experience can be added, updated, merged, reinforced, ignored, or discarded according to observed quality changes and feedback, allowing the agent to maintain reliable and transferable restoration knowledge.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 提出Causal-AgentIR，一种基于层级多智能体和自演化因果记忆图的图像修复框架，将修复经验组织为结构化因果图，支持多跳因果推理与知识的动态增删改，在多种退化场景下实现有效协作与知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复智能体通常将知识存储为静态工具描述、人工定义的退化先验或非结构化的文本摘要，缺乏对修复经验进行积累、验证、修正和遗忘的机制，限制了长期经验中的知识可维护性与可迁移性。
AI.method: 提出Causal-AgentIR层级多智能体框架，核心是自演化因果记忆图，将退化模式、图像区域、修复工具、操作、质量变化和用户偏好组织为结构化因果图，支持基于图的检索与多跳因果推理；框架包含规划、退化分析、工具专家、因果记忆推理、结果评判和记忆策展等多个协作智能体，通过观测质量变化和反馈实现知识的添加、更新、合并、增强、忽略或丢弃。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了该框架在多种退化场景下的有效性，表明结构化因果记忆图相较于静态描述或非结构化文本能够更好地支持修复知识的积累、验证与迁移，多智能体协作机制显著提升了修复质量与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将修复经验组织为可演化的因果记忆图并配合多智能体协作，能够有效克服现有智能体在知识管理方面的静态与孤立缺陷，为长期、可迁移的集体图像修复智能提供了新范式。

title: DynamicMCPBench: A Trace-Grounded, Effect-Scored Benchmark for LLM Agents over Live MCP Servers
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed over Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, yet the benchmarks used to evaluate them score the final answer or a fixed "ground-truth" list of tools, both of which are fragile once the underlying data is live and stateful. We present DynamicMCPBench, a reusable framework rather than a fixed dataset. A practitioner can run it on their own MCP servers to test models on their own tasks, or let it collect servers automatically to measure a model's general ability to solve agentic tasks. Given the servers and any set of models, it generates realistic goals, pursues each one live to record a successful trajectory, distills that trajectory into path-agnostic effect checkpoints, and scores an agent on whether it reproduces those effects, never on the final answer. To show what the framework reveals, we run it at scale: 24 models over 121 servers and 750 tasks spread evenly over 15 task categories (50 each), where each category targets a distinct tool-use challenge of the generated questions. Each task is scored by pass^3: it counts as solved only if all three independent attempts succeed. Even the strongest agents solve only about half of the tasks, 31% of tasks are solved by no model at all, and accuracy collapses as the required tool chain grows longer (from 39% on the shortest chains to 13% on the longest). A human validation study confirms the automatic scoring is reliable (chance-corrected agreement of 0.76). DynamicMCPBench thus turns benchmark construction into something practitioners can rerun on their own servers and models, while exposing a consistent inability of current agents to handle long, multi-step agentic tasks.

AI.tldr: DynamicMCPBench is a reusable benchmark框架，它通过自动生成基于MCP服务器的动态任务、记录路径无关的效果检查点来评估LLM agent，并展示了当前最强的agent也只能解决约一半的任务，且长工具链任务上的准确率从39%骤降至13%。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM agent评估基准依赖于固定正确答案或预定义的工具列表，这种静态评估方式在数据是实时和带状态的情景下非常脆弱，无法反映agent在真实动态环境中的工具使用能力。
AI.method: 提出DynamicMCPBench框架，它不是一个固定数据集，而是可复用的评估流程：给定MCP服务器和任意模型集合，自动生成真实的目标任务，现场执行并记录成功的轨迹，将轨迹蒸馏为路径无关的效果检查点，最终根据agent是否复现这些效果（而非最终答案）进行评分。
AI.result: 在24个模型、121个服务器和750个任务（均匀分布在15个类别，每类50个）上评估，每个任务采用pass^3（三次独立尝试全部通过才算解决）评分。最强的agent仅解决约一半任务，31%的任务没有任何模型能解决，且随着工具链长度增加，准确率从39%（最短链）降至13%（最长链）。人工验证表明自动评分可靠（校正后一致性0.76）。
AI.conclusion: DynamicMCPBench将基准构建转化为可复用的流程，让从业者能针对自己的服务器和模型进行评估，同时揭示了当前agent在处理长序列多步任务时的系统性能不足。

title: Safety-oriented sidewalk and road segmentation for smartphone-based assistive navigation
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to Assistive Technology
summary: Independent sidewalk mobility is essential for blind and visually impaired pedestrians (BVIPs), yet smartphone-based assistive navigation requires perception models that distinguish walkable sidewalks from adjacent unsafe regions. This study presents a safety-oriented semantic segmentation framework for future mobile guidance. We introduce SENSATION-DS, a chest-height pedestrian-view dataset with 2,752 image-mask pairs and nine-class navigation-relevant taxonomy. External urban and sidewalk datasets were harmonized to this label space, and five segmentation architectures were evaluated using staged target-domain adaptation with mask-conditioned synthetic images and Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) pseudo-labels. Models were assessed using mean Intersection over Union (mIoU), road- and sidewalk-specific metrics, Road-as-Sidewalk Error Rate as a proxy false-safe measure, and Android Open Neural Network Exchange benchmarking. Synthetic augmentation generally improved segmentation accuracy, whereas SAM2 pseudo-labels more consistently reduced Road-as-Sidewalk errors. UPerNet-MobileNetV3 achieved the highest offline mIoU (0.715 +/- 0.006), while DeepLabV3Plus-MobileNetV3 achieved the lowest Road-as-Sidewalk Error Rate (0.079) and highest Android runtime at 512x384 (7.383 FPS). These results show that assistive sidewalk perception should be evaluated jointly by segmentation accuracy, proxy false-safe behavior, and smartphone deployment feasibility, while real-world benefit requires validation with BVIP users. This evaluation supports selecting models that balance accurate perception, conservative error behavior, and practical runtime.

AI.tldr: 提出SENSATION-DS数据集和面向安全的语义分割框架，通过合成数据增强和SAM2伪标签减少将道路误判为 sidewalk 的错误，实现 sidewalk 感知中高分割精度、低假安全错误和移动端部署可行性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 盲人和视障行人（BVIPs）的独立出行依赖于智能手机辅助导航，但现有感知模型缺乏区分可通行 sidewalk 与相邻不安全区域的专用框架，需要一种兼顾分割精度、假安全错误率（Road-as-Sidewalk Error）和移动端部署可行性的 sidewalk 感知方法。
AI.method: 构建了SENSATION-DS数据集（2,752张胸高视角图像-掩码对，9类导航相关标签体系），统一外部城市和 sidewalk 数据集标签空间；使用掩码条件合成图像和Segment Anything Model 2（SAM2）伪标签进行分阶段目标域自适应，评估五种分割架构（包括UPerNet-MobileNetV3和DeepLabV3Plus-MobileNetV3）的性能。
AI.result: UPerNet-MobileNetV3获得最高离线mIoU（0.715±0.006），DeepLabV3Plus-MobileNetV3取得最低Road-as-Sidewalk Error Rate（0.079）和最高Android端运行时速度（512×384分辨率下7.383 FPS）。合成数据增强普遍提升分割精度，SAM2伪标签更一致地降低了假安全错误率。
AI.conclusion: 辅助 sidewalk 感知应联合评估分割精度、代理假安全行为和智能手机部署可行性，UPerNet-MobileNetV3和DeepLabV3Plus-MobileNetV3分别在精度和安全性上表现最优，但实际效益需要与BVIP用户进行真实世界验证。

title: ArbiGraph: Arbitrarily Scalable Verifiable Task Graphs for Evaluating Context Management
summary: We introduce ARBIGRAPH, a benchmark generator for evaluating whether tool-assisted language agents can retain, update, compose, and discard task-relevant context across extended reasoning workflows. ARBIGRAPH represents each task as a natural-language problem with an executable Python solver, and composes tasks through typed intermediate states, instantiated here as scalar and list values. This design enables controllable task graphs whose length, dependency structure, distractor count, and value type can be varied while preserving exact automatic verification. We instantiate ARBIGRAPH with math, GSM-style word-problems, and Python-tracing task categories, and evaluate a Qwen3.5-27B tool-assisted agent across four topologies. The results show high accuracy on isolated tasks but substantial degradation on more complex dependent tasks: accuracy drops by up to 33.3% on branching chains of dependent math tasks. This shows that ARBIGRAPH exposes failures that are not visible from single-task evaluation alone. Our code, generated datasets, and evaluation results are available at https://github.com/pavelgolikov/ArbiGraph.git

AI.tldr: ARBIGRAPH是一个用于评估工具辅助语言智能体在扩展推理工作流中保持、更新、组合和丢弃任务相关上下文能力的基准生成器，通过可控任务图和自动验证揭示复杂依赖任务中单任务评估无法暴露的性能退化。
AI.motivation: 现有基准大多评估语言模型在单任务上的表现，无法有效衡量工具辅助智能体在扩展推理工作流中处理复杂依赖关系、管理上下文信息的能力，缺乏能够系统控制任务长度、依赖结构、干扰项数量等维度的可验证基准。
AI.method: ARBIGRAPH将每个任务表示为带有可执行Python求解器的自然语言问题，通过类型化的中间状态（标量和列表值）组合任务，构建可控任务图。该方法支持变化任务长度、依赖结构、干扰项数量和值类型，同时保持精确自动验证。论文实例化包含数学、GSM风格文字题和Python追踪三类任务，并在四种不同拓扑结构上评估Qwen3.5-27B工具辅助智能体。
AI.result: 工具辅助智能体在孤立任务上表现高准确率，但在复杂依赖任务上显著退化：在依赖数学任务的分支链上准确率下降高达33.3%，表明ARBIGRAPH能够暴露单任务评估无法发现的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: ARBIGRAPH有效地揭示了工具辅助语言智能体在复杂推理工作流中的上下文管理缺陷，特别是依赖任务中的性能退化，为评估和提升智能体的长期推理与上下文保持能力提供了系统化的基准工具。

title: CRAG-MM-Diagnostics: Enabling Stage-Wise Analysis of Knowledge-Intensive VQA
summary: Knowledge-Intensive Visual Question Answering (KI-VQA) benchmarks evaluate Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as multimodal knowledge assistants by requiring external information beyond a provided image to answer questions. KI-VQA involves multiple sub-problems -referring expression understanding, visual grounding, object recognition, knowledge retrieval, and reasoning-yet existing benchmarks typically report only end-task accuracy, obscuring where failures arise. To analyze the full KI-VQA pipeline, we introduce CRAG-MM-Diagnostics, a diagnostic benchmark with stage-wise data annotations that isolate 1) language-based visual grounding, 2) object identification, and 3) knowledge retrieval and reasoning. We evaluate fully parametric and retrieval-augmented VLMs, providing fine-grained analyses using newly collected metadata, such as target ROIs, entity names, and visual complexity scores. Our results point to knowledge retrieval and reasoning as the primary bottleneck, but also highlight issues in the other parts of the KI-VQA pipeline, such as the fact that VLMs struggle with target object identification or that image retrievers struggle to integrate textual cues. These findings expose fundamental limitations in current KI-VQA systems and motivate stage-aware evaluation. We, lastly, leverage these findings to propose a grounded bimodal RAG pipeline that integrates a visual grounding module to crop targets before image retrieval, boosting GPT-5 and Qwen's respective accuracies by 13.3 and 8.5 percentage points.

AI.tldr: 提出CRAG-MM-Diagnostics诊断基准，对知识密集型VQA进行逐阶段细粒度分析，发现知识检索与推理是主要瓶颈，并基于此提出一种带视觉定位模块的双模态RAG管线，在GPT-5和Qwen上分别提升13.3和8.5个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有KI-VQA基准仅报告端到端准确率，无法定位失败原因，而该任务涉及指代理解、视觉定位、目标识别、知识检索和推理等多个子问题，缺乏对各阶段独立诊断的数据集和分析方法。
AI.method: 构建CRAG-MM-Diagnostics诊断基准，包含三个阶段式标注数据分别隔离语言视觉定位、目标识别、知识检索与推理；评估全参数和检索增强型VLM；提出结合视觉定位模块的双模态RAG管线，在图像检索前裁剪目标区域。
AI.result: 知识检索与推理是KI-VQA的主要瓶颈，但VLM在目标识别上也存在困难，图像检索器难以整合文本线索；所提出的带视觉定位的双模态RAG管线在GPT-5和Qwen上分别提升13.3和8.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: KI-VQA系统存在多阶段瓶颈，需进行阶段感知的细粒度评估；引入视觉定位模块增强输入图像质量可显著提升下游RAG性能，为多模态知识问答提供了有效的改进方向。

title: The Human-AI Substitution Principle: When will you be replaced by AI in your organization?
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming organizations, raising a fundamental organizational and economic question: when will a human employee be replaced by AI? We present an analytical model for studying Human--AI Task Allocation (HAT) in hierarchical organizations. A central feature of the HAT model is that it formally encodes the economic asymmetry between human skill acquisition and AI capability scaling. The HAT model allows us to derive how risk-adjusted costs, skills, organizational depth, deployment scale, strategic adaptation, and risk jointly determine when, where, why, and under what structural conditions human--AI replacement occurs. A key result is the Human--AI Substitution Principle, which provides a precise condition --- grounded in the formal asymmetry assumption --- under which AI replaces human labor. Building on this result, we show that AI adoption can produce abrupt workforce transitions, hybrid human--AI organizations, including cases where risk heterogeneity sustains human and AI roles without requiring a minimum-human-fraction constraint, and flatter managerial hierarchies with wider spans of control. The HAT model identifies structural conditions under which middle-management roles exhibit elevated vulnerability to automation, and shows that the vulnerability of highly skilled workers depends on a skill threshold shaped by organizational depth, baseline costs, and risk differentials. More broadly, the paper connects automation economics, organizational design, AI governance, and workforce planning into a unified theory of AI-driven organizational transformation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个分析框架——人机任务分配（HAT）模型，正式编码了人类技能获取与AI能力扩展之间的经济不对称性，并推导出人机替代原则，以解释层级组织中AI替代人类劳动力的条件、时机与结构影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏一个统一的理论框架来理解AI在层级组织中替代人类员工的条件与结构性因素，尤其是未能从经济学角度形式化编码人类技能获取与AI能力扩展之间的根本不对称性。
AI.method: 提出人机任务分配（HAT）分析模型，核心是形式化编码人类技能获取与AI能力扩展之间的经济不对称性，并基于此推导风险调整成本、技能水平、组织深度、部署规模、战略适应与风险如何共同决定人机替代的条件，最终得出人机替代原则。
AI.result: 模型揭示了AI替代可导致突变的劳动力转型、产生混合人机组织（包括在风险异质性下无需最低人类比例约束即可共存的情况），以及更扁平化、管理跨度更大的层级结构；中层管理岗位具有更高的自动化脆弱性，而高技能工人的脆弱性取决于由组织深度、基准成本和风险差异共同塑造的技能阈值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将自动化经济学、组织设计、AI治理与劳动力规划统一为一个AI驱动组织转型的理论框架，为理解人类与AI在组织中的最优分工、替代条件及结构性影响提供了形式化基础。

title: Detectors Learn the Wrong Thing: Shortcut-Resistant Adversarial Training Against Physically Realizable Attacks
summary: AI-enabled visual perception systems are increasingly deployed in intelligent transportation infrastructure and autonomous vehicle related applications. However, physically realizable adversarial appearances pose a significant reliability challenge for these safety-critical systems. Adversarial training is effective, but repeated co-occurrence between adversarial texture and positive person instances can cause detectors to treat the texture itself as evidence of object presence, forming a patch texture shortcut. The detector may then treat texture as evidence for the target, causing false detections on texture-only inputs and weakening cross attack generalisation. We propose InsCAT, an instance-level contrastive adversarial training framework that prevents detectors from using adversarial texture as an independent decision cue. SICA aligns adversarial person features with matched clean features and separates them from texture-only negatives, while ROPO and Guard maintain online attack pressure and coordinate training. We evaluate eight independently generated attack textures on rendered nuScenes, INRIAPerson, printed garments, and three detector families. InsCAT achieves an average attack AP of 82.3% on rendered nuScenes, exceeding the strongest baseline by 11.1 points.Relative to AT-Mix, texture FPR decreases from 46.9% to 7.3%. Physical tests yield an F1 score of 96.6% and an FPR of 1.8%. Consistent gains across separately trained detectors demonstrate applicability across architectures with direct inference. The findings show that robust physical detection depends on preserving target related evidence while preventing adversarial texture from becoming an independent decision cu

AI.tldr: InsCAT通过实例级对比对抗训练框架，防止检测器将对抗纹理作为独立决策线索，在多个数据集和检测器家族上显著降低了纹理假阳性率并提升了鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 物理可实现的对抗外观对AI视觉感知系统（尤其在自动驾驶与智能交通中）构成严重可靠性挑战；现有对抗训练方法中，对抗纹理与正例人像的重复共现会导致检测器将纹理本身视为物体存在证据，形成"纹理捷径"并引发误检和跨攻击泛化能力下降。
AI.method: 提出InsCAT实例级对比对抗训练框架，包含三个核心组件：SICA模块将带有对抗纹理的人物特征与匹配的干净特征对齐，并使其与仅含纹理的负样本分离；ROPO和Guard模块分别维持在线攻击压力与协调训练进程，共同防止检测器将对抗纹理作为独立决策线索。
AI.result: 在渲染nuScenes数据集上，InsCAT平均攻击AP达82.3%，超过最强基线11.1个百分点；相较AT-Mix，纹理假阳性率从46.9%降至7.3%；物理测试F1分数达96.6%，FPR仅1.8%；在三个检测器家族上均取得一致性提升，验证了跨架构的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒的物理对抗检测关键在于保留目标相关证据的同时阻止对抗纹理成为独立决策线索；InsCAT通过实例级对比学习有效打破纹理捷径，在多种攻击纹理和真实物理测试中均表现出显著的鲁棒性提升和泛化能力。

title: Auditing Provenance Sensitivity in LLM Agent Action Selection
summary: LLM agents choose tools and arguments from context that mixes user requests, tool outputs, retrieved records, memory, and untrusted text. Evidence can be relevant without being authorized to determine a decision, so a correct action need not be grounded only in permitted evidence. We introduce a target-specific authorization audit that labels context factors separately for each tool and argument target. Its primary test holds the task, proposition, position, and policy fixed while changing only the proposition's source authority. We then test behavior when valid evidence is weakened and use context-subset interactions as a secondary localization diagnostic. Across 450 controlled next-action tasks and multiple open-weight LLM families, trusted and untrusted variants produce different actions in 5.4 percent of competing cases versus 1.7 percent of supporting cases. Under controlled degradation, unauthorized competition is retained in a full-correct, mixed-error, clean-correct pattern in 2.4 percent of comparisons, with a 95 percent confidence interval from 2.1 to 3.0 percent. These are controlled stress-set rates, not deployment prevalence. The models respond to textual source-authority cues, but this does not prevent untrusted evidence from influencing their actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对LLM智能体工具调用决策的、面向目标的授权审计方法，通过分离证据来源的权威性来检测未经授权的证据对智能体行为的影响，实验表明在受控条件下仍有约2.4%的比较中未经授权的竞争证据显著影响了智能体的行动选择。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在工具选择和参数生成时会混合用户请求、工具输出、检索记录、记忆和不可信文本等多种上下文证据，其中相关但不具备授权资格的证据可能影响决策。现有方法缺乏细粒度的授权审计机制来区分不同来源证据对具体工具和参数决策的影响。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种面向目标的授权审计方法，对每个工具和参数目标分别标注上下文因素，核心测试在固定任务、命题、立场和策略的情况下仅改变命题的源权威性，并通过削弱有效证据和上下文子集交互作为辅助定位诊断手段。
AI.result: 在450个受控下一动作任务和多个开放权重LLM家族上，信任变体与不信任变体在竞争案例中有5.4%产生不同动作，在支持案例中为1.7%；在受控退化下，未经授权的竞争在完全正确-混合错误-干净正确模式中占2.4%的比较，95%置信区间为2.1%–3.0%。
AI.conclusion: 模型能够响应文本层面的源权威性线索，但这并不足以阻止不可信证据影响其行动决策，表明需要更稳健的授权控制机制来确保LLM智能体的行为合规性。

title: HGeo-TopoMap: Boosting Topological Mapping with Hierarchical Geometric Priors
comment: The source code and model weights will be made publicly available at https://github.com/lynn-yu/HGeo-TopoMap
summary: Topological maps are key outputs of autonomous driving perception systems, delivering essential road information for path planning. They identify instances such as centerlines and traffic signs, along with their connectivity relationships. Due to the lack of explicit markings for centerlines in real-world environments, the detection of centerline instances remains a significant challenge. To tackle this problem, we propose HGeo-TopoMap, which leverages an explicit prior map and implicit spatial relations to hierarchically boost topological mapping. First, a geometric adaptive learning module is designed for the road structure map obtained via inverse perspective mapping. This module discretely encodes semantic and spatial features from the map, followed by a prior-mask attention mechanism that selectively focuses on informative regions. Then, a geometric consistency learning module is devised, which leverages the geometric properties and spatial relationships of centerlines. Built on the geometry-aware decoder, it enforces spatial consistency by aligning features of centerline instances with identical geometric orientations. The proposed method is evaluated on the OpenLane-V2 dataset across the centerline, lane segment, and robustness benchmarks. Beyond substantial improvements in topological mapping accuracy, the proposed method offers the benefit of enhanced robustness, consistently outperforming baselines under both standard and challenging conditions. The source code and model weights will be made publicly available at https://github.com/lynn-yu/HGeo-TopoMap.

AI.tldr: HGeo-TopoMap通过显式先验地图与隐式空间关系分层提升拓扑地图构建，提出几何自适应学习模块和几何一致性学习模块，在OpenLane-V2数据集上显著提升了中心线检测和拓扑映射的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 实际道路环境中中心线缺乏明确物理标记，导致自动驾驶感知系统中基于拓扑地图的中心线实例检测及其连接关系建模面临显著挑战，现有方法难以在高精度和鲁棒性上取得满意效果。
AI.method: 提出HGeo-TopoMap方法，包含两个核心模块：一是几何自适应学习模块，对经逆透视映射得到的道路结构图进行离散语义与空间特征编码，并引入先验掩码注意力机制选择性地关注信息丰富区域；二是几何一致性学习模块，基于几何感知解码器，利用中心线的几何属性与空间关系，通过对齐具有相同几何朝向的中心线实例特征来强制空间一致性。
AI.result: 在OpenLane-V2数据集上的中心线、车道段和鲁棒性三个基准评估中，HGeo-TopoMap在拓扑映射精度上取得了显著提升，并在标准与挑战性条件下均持续优于基线方法，展示了更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 显式先验地图与隐式空间关系的结合能够有效提升中心线检测与拓扑映射的性能，几何一致性约束在复杂场景中提供了重要的鲁棒性增益，该方法为自动驾驶拓扑感知提供了可行的分层增强范式。

title: Is Deep Research Reliable? Misleading Knowledge Induces False Conclusions
summary: Deep Research agents extend LLM-based assistants into long-horizon workflows involving planning, retrieval, evidence synthesis, and report generation, yet their reliability in open information environments remains underexplored. A key concern is whether apparently credible but factually misleading knowledge encountered in such environments can propagate through these workflows and be adopted as false conclusions in final reports. To study this failure mode, we introduce MisKnow-Agent, a framework for constructing and validating misleading knowledge for Deep Research tasks. MisKnow-Agent generates misleading instances with controllable authority levels and styles, yielding 5,933 quality-controlled instances built on DeepResearch Benchmark tasks. Extensive experiments across open-source and closed-source Deep Research agents show that even limited exposure to misleading knowledge can induce false-conclusion adoption in final reports, revealing a broad reliability vulnerability in current Deep Research agents. Although search-enabled verifier models consistently identify the retained instances as misleading during focused corpus validation, the same instances can still be adopted during long-horizon research, revealing a disconnect between focused verification and workflow-level evidence use. Finally, we evaluate pre- and post-research defenses, both individually and in combination, finding that all three configurations mitigate but do not fully prevent false-conclusion adoption. Our findings suggest that reliable Deep Research requires evidence verification and correction capabilities at both the model and framework levels, beyond improvements in planning, retrieval, evidence integration, or report-generation abilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MisKnow-Agent框架，用于构建和验证面向Deep Research任务的误导性知识实例，并通过实验揭示当前Deep Research Agent在长周期工作流中容易将误导性信息采纳为错误结论的可靠性漏洞，同时评估了多种防御策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: Deep Research Agent将基于LLM的助手扩展到涉及规划、检索、证据合成和报告生成的长周期工作流中，但其在开放信息环境中的可靠性尚未得到充分探索。一个关键问题是，环境中看似可信但事实上有误导性的知识是否会通过这些工作流传播，并在最终报告中被采纳为错误结论。本文旨在系统研究这一故障模式。
AI.method: 提出了MisKnow-Agent框架，用于为Deep Research任务构建和验证具有可控权威级别和风格的误导性知识实例，共生成5,933个经过质量控制的实例并基于DeepResearch Benchmark任务构建。在多种开源和闭源Deep Research Agent上进行实验，对比了搜索增强验证模型在聚焦语料验证与长周期工作流中的表现差异，并评估了研究前和研究后的防御策略及其组合效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使有限的误导性知识暴露也能导致最终报告中采纳错误结论，揭示了当前Deep Research Agent存在广泛的可靠性漏洞。搜索增强验证模型在聚焦语料验证中能一致识别出误导性实例，但同样的实例在长周期研究工作流中仍可能被采纳，揭示了聚焦验证与工作流级别证据使用之间的脱节。所有三种防御配置（研究前、研究后及组合）均能缓解错误结论采纳，但无法完全阻止。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的Deep Research需要在模型和框架两个层面具备证据验证与纠错能力，而不仅仅是改进规划、检索、证据整合或报告生成能力。当前的防御策略虽能缓解问题但无法完全防止虚假结论的采纳，提示未来需要在验证机制与工作流整合方面进行更深入的研究。

title: DINOde: Continuous Vision-Text Alignment for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. 27 pages, 8 figures, and 10 tables. Includes supplementary material
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) leverages textual semantics to segment objects beyond predefined categories. While the self-supervised model DINOv3 provides strong structured visual representations, its lack of native textual alignment hinders its direct application to OVSS. To bridge this gap, we propose DINOde, an ODE-based framework that continuously aligns CLIP text embeddings with the DINO visual manifold. Our approach employs two complementary components: (i) Semantic Text Flow (STF), which evolves text embeddings toward the DINO manifold through a continuous ODE trajectory, and (ii) Global Context Flow (GCF), which progressively refines the holistic image representation carried by DINO's CLS token. To preserve the hyperspherical geometry of the feature space during this evolution, we further introduce Velocity Tangent Projection, which constrains the learned velocity field to the tangent space. By modeling alignment as a continuous trajectory, DINOde avoids the manifold entanglement inherent in discrete MLP projections and yields more robust cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DINOde consistently outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple OVSS benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/yoon307/DINOde.

AI.tldr: DINOde提出了一个基于常微分方程（ODE）的框架，通过连续轨迹将CLIP文本嵌入与DINO视觉流形对齐，克服了离散MLP投影导致的流形纠缠问题，在开放词汇语义分割任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇语义分割（OVSS）依赖文本语义分割超出预定义类别的目标，自监督模型DINOv3虽能提供强结构化的视觉表征，但其缺乏原生的文本对齐能力，难以直接应用于OVSS。现有方法通常采用离散MLP投影来桥接模态，但这种方式容易导致流形纠缠，限制了跨模态对齐的鲁棒性。
AI.method: DINOde提出了一个ODE框架，通过连续轨迹将CLIP文本嵌入与DINO视觉流形对齐。框架包含两个互补组件：语义文本流（STF）通过连续ODE演化将文本嵌入逐步映射到DINO流形；全局上下文流（GCF）逐步精炼DINO的CLS token承载的整体图像表征。此外，引入速度切面投影（Velocity Tangent Projection）来约束学习到的速度场位于切空间，从而保持特征空间的超球面几何结构。
AI.result: 在多个开放词汇语义分割基准上，DINOde一致性地超越现有方法，取得了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，通过将对齐建模为连续轨迹而非离散投影，DINOde有效避免了流形纠缠，实现了更鲁棒的跨模态对齐。
AI.conclusion: DINOde证明了将跨模态对齐建模为连续ODE轨迹相比传统离散MLP投影具有显著优势，能够更好地保持特征空间的几何结构并避免流形纠缠。该工作为融合自监督视觉模型与视觉-语言模型的表征提供了一种新的范式，代码已开源。

title: SciExplore: Evaluating Autonomous Agents from Scientific Navigation to Information Integration
summary: Scientific research involves complex information-seeking and reasoning workflows across heterogeneous sources. However, existing benchmarks primarily emphasize general-domain retrieval or static scientific question answering, and therefore fail to assess key capabilities required in realistic scientific research workflows. We introduce SciExplore, a benchmark designed to evaluate scientific information-seeking and reasoning capabilities of LLMs and agents. SciExplore comprises four task types covering 103 expert-curated tasks across more than ten scientific disciplines: scientific database navigation, ambiguous literature retrieval, missing reference completion, and cross-source structured knowledge synthesis, which probe progressively higher-level abilities from entity-level reasoning and document-level identification to evidence-level grounding and domain-level synthesis. We evaluate over ten state-of-the-art LLMs and autonomous agents on SciExplore, revealing substantial performance gaps with performance degrading sharply as task complexity increases and extremely low accuracy on the most challenging structured synthesis tasks. These results highlight significant limitations of current models and agents in realistic scientific information-seeking scenarios.

AI.tldr: SciExplore是一个涵盖四个任务类型、103个专家设计任务的科学信息检索与推理基准，评估了十余种大语言模型和智能体，发现现有模型在复杂科学推理任务中性能急剧下降，尤其在结构化知识合成任务中准确率极低。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要集中在通用领域检索或静态科学问答上，无法评估真实科学研究流程中跨异构信息源的复杂信息检索与推理能力，缺乏对标科学信息寻求全流程的系统性评估基准。
AI.method: SciExplore基准包含四大任务类型：科学数据库导航、模糊文献检索、缺失文献补全和跨源结构化知识合成，共涵盖103个专家设计任务，横跨十余个科学学科，任务难度从实体级推理逐步提升到文档级识别、证据级定位和领域级综合。
AI.result: 在十余种最先进的LLM和自主智能体上的评估显示，随着任务复杂度增加，模型性能急剧下降，在最具挑战性的结构化知识合成任务上准确率极低，揭示了当前模型在真实科学信息检索场景下的显著局限性。
AI.conclusion: SciExplore揭示了现有大语言模型和智能体在处理真实科学研究流程中的复杂信息检索与推理任务时存在巨大性能差距，尤其在高层次跨源知识综合任务上能力严重不足，为未来提升模型在科学信息寻求场景中的能力提供了方向。

title: When Are Reasoning-Based Guardrails Not Efficient? ResponseGuard: A Fast Vision-Language Guard for Real-Time Moderation
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Project page: https://ndb796.github.io/ResponseGuard ; Code: https://github.com/ndb796/ResponseGuard
summary: A vision-language AI assistant returns its answer as a stream of generated tokens. Therefore, a safety guard that watches that answer has to keep up with the stream and stop a harmful reply before a user reads it. Recent vision-language guardrails instead generate a chain of thought before they issue a verdict. They believe that step-by-step reasoning yields a safer guard. This design makes the guard heavy and slow, since the model must decode many tokens for harmfulness detection. We pose the question of whether a vision-language guard really needs to reason in order to screen a response. We answer with a guard that has no chain. ResponseGuard reads a harmful verdict from a single pooled representation of the request, the response, and the image in one forward pass. Across a standard multimodal guardrail benchmark, our 2B ResponseGuard outperforms a recent 3B reasoning-based vision-language guard on response harmfulness detection, without any reasoning and at about 150 times lower time cost. On request harmfulness the reasoning guard retains an overall lead, and the remaining gap on both tracks sits on the image-only cells. We observe that the gap may stem from the frozen vision encoders that both designs use rather than from the missing chain. We have also found the reasoning guard directs almost none of its verdict attention to the image. Based on a single-pass detection, ResponseGuard can screen an answer sentence by sentence as it streams and stop a harmful answer before it finishes. For guarding the response of a vision-language model, a calibrated single-pass label may provide a sufficient safety signal. We fully release all source code, trained models, and datasets at https://github.com/ndb796/ResponseGuard.

AI.tldr: ResponseGuard是一种无需思维链推理的单遍视觉语言安全护栏，通过从请求、响应和图像的池化表示中直接输出有害性判决，在响应有害性检测上超越基于推理的3B模型，同时时间成本降低约150倍。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言安全护栏依赖思维链推理进行有害性检测，导致模型需要解码大量令牌才能做出判决，造成推理速度慢、计算开销大，难以跟上流式生成的回答并及时阻止有害内容。
AI.method: ResponseGuard摒弃思维链推理，在单次前向传播中从请求、响应和图像三者联合的池化表示直接输出有害性判决。模型规模为2B参数，采用单遍分类范式，可逐句对流式回答进行筛查并在有害回答生成完毕前及时拦截。
AI.result: 在多模态护栏标准基准上，2B规模的ResponseGuard在响应有害性检测任务中超越了近期3B规模的基于推理的视觉语言护栏，时间成本降低约150倍；在请求有害性检测上推理型护栏仍整体领先，两者差距主要源于图像单元格，可能与两者使用的固定视觉编码器有关。
AI.conclusion: 推理型护栏几乎未将判决注意力分配至图像，表明其性能优势并非来自思维链本身。对于视觉语言模型的响应防护，校准后的单遍分类标签可提供足够的安全信号。所有代码、模型和数据集均已开源。

title: Beyond Independent Optimization: Compression, MoE Routing, and Quantization Interactions in Multimodal Edge Intelligence
summary: Efficient multimodal inference is increasingly constrained not only by model quality or FLOP count, but also by the cost of preserving, moving, routing, caching, and quantizing multimodal representations under latency, memory, and energy constraints. This paper reviews recent advances in efficient vision-language and multimodal large language models, covering visual token compression, video token management, KV-cache optimization, Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) routing, low-bit quantization, edge deployment, and hardware-aware benchmarking. We argue that these techniques cannot be treated as independent optimizations. Visual token compression alters downstream feature distributions and MoE routing decisions, routing behavior affects expert utilization and quantization sensitivity, quantized router logits influence expert assignment, KV-cache policies determine retained multimodal evidence, and hardware constraints often transform computational savings into memory and communication bottlenecks. We organize the literature around these interactions and identify key design trade-offs, including accuracy versus token budget, static versus adaptive compression, sparse routing efficiency versus expert collapse, and low-bit inference versus modality-specific degradation. Finally, we introduce Temporal Routing Consistency as a diagnostic for video MoE models and highlight open research directions in routing-aware compression, cross-modal cache management, hardware-aware co-design, and unified benchmarking for multimodal edge intelligence.

AI.tldr: 该综述系统分析了多模态大模型高效推理中各项优化技术（视觉令牌压缩、KV缓存优化、MoE路由、低比特量化等）之间的耦合关系与设计权衡，揭示了技术间不可独立优化的本质，并提出时序路由一致性作为诊断工具，为多模态边缘智能提供了统一的研究框架。
AI.motivation: 多模态推理效率不仅受模型质量和FLOPs数量限制，更受到在延迟、内存和能量约束下对多模态表示进行存储、移动、路由、缓存和量化的成本制约。现有研究往往将视觉令牌压缩、KV缓存优化、MoE路由、低比特量化等技术视为独立优化问题，忽视了它们之间的深层交互与耦合效应，亟需统一视角来系统梳理这些相互依赖关系。
AI.method: 该综述系统整理了视觉令牌压缩、视频令牌管理、KV缓存优化、MoE路由、低比特量化、边缘部署及硬件感知基准测试等关键技术，重点分析了技术间的交互机制：视觉令牌压缩改变下游特征分布与MoE路由决策、路由行为影响专家利用率和量化敏感性、量化后的路由器logits影响专家分配、KV缓存策略决定保留的多模态证据、硬件约束将计算节省转化为内存和通信瓶颈。同时提出了时序路由一致性（Temporal Routing Consistency）作为视频MoE模型的诊断指标。
AI.result: 论文识别了多项关键设计权衡：准确性 vs 令牌预算、静态 vs 自适应压缩、稀疏路由效率 vs 专家崩溃、低比特推理 vs 模态特异性退化。通过分析技术间耦合效应，揭示了视觉令牌压缩如何级联影响路由和量化行为，以及硬件约束如何重新分配计算节省与通信开销，从而影响整体系统效率。
AI.conclusion: 该综述强调多模态推理优化技术必须作为耦合系统而非独立组件进行设计，指出了联合优化的重要性。提出的时序路由一致性为视频MoE模型提供了新的诊断工具，同时明确了面向多模态边缘智能的关键开放研究方向：路由感知压缩、跨模态缓存管理、硬件感知协同设计以及统一基准测试。

title: Towards Privacy-Preserving Federated Prompt Tuning under Data Heterogeneity: A Subspace-Decomposed Expert Approach
summary: Federated prompt tuning (FPT) enables collaborative adaptation of vision--language models (VLMs) using lightweight prompts. Existing methods often address heterogeneity and privacy through a split-prompt design under local differential privacy (DP), combining a shared prompt for global transfer with private prompts for local adaptation. However, a single shared prompt may over-smooth diverse transferable knowledge, weakening the balance between personalization and generalization. Multi-expert prompts (MEPs) can better capture this diversity, but enlarge the communicated space, increasing DP noise and communication cost while making robust expert composition more difficult. We propose FedSEPT, a privacy-preserving Fed}erated Subspace-decomposed Expert Prompt Tuning. Specifically, we employ Subspace-decomposed Expert Modeling (SEM) to parameterize multiple prompt experts with shared low-rank factors, a fixed public basis, and private residuals, thereby confining communication and DP perturbation to a compact factor space while enabling direct server aggregation in a common coordinate system. We further design Instance-aware Expert Fusion (IEF), which adaptively combines semantically complementary experts via on-device routing and performs efficient logit-level fusion using cached expert-specific text features. Extensive experiments on 11 heterogeneous benchmarks show that, under the same privacy constraints, FedSEPT achieves a better trade-off between local adaptation and global generalization than strong baselines.

AI.tldr: FedSEPT提出了一种隐私保护的联邦提示微调方法，通过子空间分解的专家建模和实例感知的专家融合，在联邦视觉-语言模型微调中实现了更好的个性化与泛化权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦提示微调方法采用共享提示和私有提示的拆分设计，但单一共享提示会过度平滑多样化的可迁移知识，削弱个性化与泛化的平衡；多专家提示虽能捕获多样性，但会扩大通信空间，增加差分隐私噪声和通信成本，且难以实现鲁棒的专家组合。
AI.method: FedSEPT包含两个核心组件：子空间分解的专家建模，将多个提示专家参数化为共享低秩因子、固定公共基和私有残差，将通信和差分隐私扰动限制在紧凑的因子空间中，并支持在公共坐标系下直接进行服务器聚合；实例感知的专家融合，通过设备端路由自适应组合语义互补的专家，并利用缓存的专家特定文本特征进行高效logit级融合。
AI.result: 在11个异构基准数据集上的大量实验表明，在相同的隐私约束下，FedSEPT在局部适应和全局泛化之间实现了比强基线方法更优的权衡。
AI.conclusion: FedSEPT通过子空间分解和实例感知融合有效解决了多专家提示在联邦场景下的通信和隐私难题，为联邦视觉-语言模型的个性化微调提供了新的有效范式。

title: GuardianAgentBench: Where Agents Fail and How to Guard Them
summary: As large language model agents increasingly operate autonomously with access to tools and external environments, ensuring their safe and reliable behavior becomes critical. We present GuardianAgentBench (GABench), a benchmark of 580 scenarios across six domains evaluated on three production-ready frameworks: LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Vectara. The benchmark incorporates rigorous multi-stage validation and five adversarial attack modes. Experiments with six state-of-the-art models reveal that even the strongest configuration achieves only 74.8% overall accuracy and expose two distinct failure regimes: stronger models under-call required tools, while weaker models mis-select and over-call tools. Performance degrades monotonically with both tool-set size and sequential turn depth, with long-horizon planning proving the steeper bottleneck. Our guardrail implementation consistently outperforms system-prompt-based defenses across all models, recovering 19.9% of failures at a false positive rate of just 0.5%. These results demonstrate that execution-time structural intervention improves safety without disrupting correct agent behavior.

AI.tldr: GuardianAgentBench (GABench) 是一个包含580个场景、六领域、覆盖三个生产级框架的智能体安全基准测试，实验表明最强配置仅达74.8%准确率，并发现强模型欠调用工具、弱模型误选与过调用工具两种失败模式，其防护栏机制能以0.5%误报率恢复19.9%的失败案例。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型智能体在工具调用和外部环境交互中日益自主化，但缺乏系统化的安全性与可靠性评估基准，现有方法难以全面衡量不同模型和框架在面对对抗攻击时的鲁棒性及失败模式。
AI.method: 构建了GuardianAgentBench (GABench) 基准，包含580个场景、六领域、三种生产级框架（LangChain、LlamaIndex、Vectara），采用多阶段验证和五种对抗攻击模式，并提出了执行时结构干预的防护栏（guardrail）机制，与基于系统提示的防御方法进行对比。
AI.result: 六个最先进模型在最强配置下整体准确率仅达74.8%；强模型倾向欠调用必要工具，弱模型则误选并过调用工具；性能随工具集大小和推理步数单调下降，长程规划是更严峻的瓶颈；防护栏机制以0.5%假阳性率恢复19.9%的失败案例，一致优于系统提示防御。
AI.conclusion: 执行时结构干预（防护栏）能有效提升智能体安全性而不干扰正确行为，长程规划和工具选择是智能体安全的主要瓶颈，GABench为评估和改善自主智能体安全性提供了系统化标准化基准。

title: Adaptive Identity Anchoring: Closed-Loop Keyframe Placement for Synthetic Paired Supervision in Video Face Swapping
summary: Video face swapping has no natural paired supervision: no real footage exists of one person's face performing another person's video. The strongest current answer, DreamID-V's SyncID-Pipe, mints pairs by replacing the identity in exactly two frames of a real clip -- the first and the last -- and regenerating the rest from a pose sequence alone. Pose carries no appearance evidence of the swapped-in identity, so over long clips, occlusions, and extreme pose excursions the synthesized identity has a long unanchored span on which to drift; no published ablation examines anchor count or placement. We propose Adaptive Identity Anchoring (AIA): (i) generalize the synthesizer to arbitrary anchor sets, architecturally natural for diffusion-forcing-style transformers where conditioning on a frame is clamping its tokens to zero noise; (ii) place anchors by a closed feedback loop that scores every generated frame against the real reference identity and inserts an image-face-swapped anchor at the worst-scoring frame until the pair passes a threshold or exhausts a budget; (iii) reuse the loop's verdict as an automatic data filter. A second pathology, the beauty-filter look of over-smoothed skin, has the same root cause: micro-texture, like identity, is priced by none of the pipeline's objectives. We therefore pair AIA with Reality-Referenced Texture Restoration: matched re-graining from each real frame's non-face regions, band-split transfer of sub-identity micro-texture from the real footage, and a second, spectral acceptance channel refereed by the footage's own spectrum. Identity-anchor density, we argue, is a controllable quality dial, and we specify falsifiable experiments -- drift-versus-gap curves, uniform-versus-adaptive placement at matched budgets, student training on AIA-minted data, and texture ablations with a human beauty-filter study -- that would validate or refute the proposal.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应身份锚定（AIA）和现实参考纹理恢复（RRTR）方法，分别解决视频换脸中无配对监督导致的身份漂移问题和过度平滑的"美颜滤镜"伪影问题，通过动态锚点放置和频段纹理迁移来提升长视频换脸的身份保真度与纹理真实感。
AI.motivation: 现有视频换脸方法（如DreamID-V的SyncID-Pipe）仅依赖首尾两帧进行身份锚定，在长视频、遮挡和极端姿态下，中间帧的身份缺乏监督信号导致严重的身份漂移；同时，管线中所有目标函数均未对微观纹理进行约束，导致生成结果呈现过度平滑的"美颜滤镜"伪影。这两个问题的根本原因在于缺乏对锚点密度和微观纹理的有效控制与度量。
AI.method: 提出两个核心模块：自适应身份锚定（AIA）将合成器泛化至任意锚点集（通过扩散强制型Transformer的零噪声token夹持实现），并构建闭环反馈回路——对每帧生成结果评分后，在得分最差的帧处插入一个经图像级换脸处理的身份锚点，直到通过阈值或耗尽预算；同时复用该评分作为自动数据过滤器。现实参考纹理恢复（RRTR）则从每帧真实画面的非面部区域提取纹理进行匹配再颗粒化、对真实素材进行频段分割以传递亚身份级别的微观纹理，并引入由素材自身频谱裁决的第二条光谱接受通道。
AI.result: 论文提出了一套可验证的实验方案：包括漂移-间隔曲线、相同预算下均匀锚点与自适应锚点的对比、在AIA生成数据上进行学生模型训练，以及纹理消融实验配合人类美颜滤镜感知研究。通过这些实验可验证或反驳所提出方法的有效性，但论文尚未给出具体的定量实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 身份锚点密度是一个可控的质量调节旋钮，自适应锚点放置优于均匀锚点放置；微观纹理缺失与身份漂移具有相同的根因（缺乏监督信号），RRTR方法通过从真实素材中迁移频段级微观纹理可有效消除美颜滤镜伪影；AIA生成的配对数据可用于训练学生模型，实现无监督视频换脸。

title: Workflow-Localized Mechanism Learning: Attribution-Guided Repair and Knowledge Reuse for Structured Agent Skills
summary: Agent Skills package reusable procedural knowledge as external artifacts for frozen language-model agents, yet existing optimizers do not jointly resolve where a failure occurs in a workflow, which mechanism caused it, and how relevant knowledge from third-party Skills should be reused locally. We introduce Workflow-Localized Mechanism Learning (WML). Its Node--Mechanism Attribution identifies the failed workflow node, implicated mechanisms, and smallest valid edit target, routing single-mechanism defects to L3 resources and relational defects across mechanisms to L2 composition protocols. A six-module Workflow-Guided Skill Optimization (WGSO) loop then selects provenance- and scope-aware third-party knowledge, applies bounded patches, evaluates candidates, and stores verified outcomes in optimizer-side memory. On SpreadsheetBench, WML reaches 90.33 +/- 1.53 and 74.67 +/- 3.51 Hard Accuracy with DeepSeek and Qwen3.6-Flash, respectively; without additional optimization, the learned Skills transfer to WikiTableQuestions with 84.00 +/- 2.00 and 83.00 +/- 2.00 Denotation Accuracy. On Compiler-Supported50, WML attains both the highest hard-PASS rate and the lowest cost per successful task; compiled execution sharply reduces tokens and calls relative to a direct SkillAgent while retaining most of its successful tasks. Code and artifacts are available at https://github.com/xiaolin9595/workflow-localized-mechanism-learning.

AI.tldr: 提出工作流局部化机制学习（WML），通过节点-机制归因辨识工作流故障位置与成因，并结合工作流导向的技能优化循环从第三方技能包中获取并适配相关知识；在SpreadsheetBench和Compiler-Supported50上取得SOTA性能，且学到的技能可零额外优化迁移至WikiTableQuestions。
AI.motivation: 现有Agent Skills将可复用过程性知识封装为外部工件以支持冻结的语言模型智能体，但已有优化器无法联合解析工作流中故障发生的具体节点、导致故障的机制以及如何从第三方技能包中局部复用相关知识，缺乏系统化的故障定位与知识适配机制。
AI.method: 提出Workflow-Localized Mechanism Learning (WML)，包含两阶段核心方法：1) Node–Mechanism Attribution，通过识别故障工作流节点、所涉机制及最小有效编辑目标，将单机制缺陷路由至L3资源、多机制间关系缺陷路由至L2组合协议；2) Workflow-Guided Skill Optimization (WGSO)六模块循环，选择具有来源和范围感知的第三方知识、施加有界补丁、评估候选方案并将验证结果存入优化器端记忆。
AI.result: 在SpreadsheetBench上，WML结合DeepSeek和Qwen3.6-Flash分别达到90.33±1.53和74.67±3.51的Hard Accuracy；无需额外优化，学到的Skills迁移至WikiTableQuestions获得84.00±2.00和83.00±2.00的Denotation Accuracy。在Compiler-Supported50上，WML同时取得最高的hard-PASS率和最低的每成功任务成本，编译执行相比直接SkillAgent大幅减少token和调用次数，同时保留大部分成功任务。
AI.conclusion: WML通过联合故障定位与知识适配实现了高效的工作流技能优化，验证了局部化机制学习在冻结语言模型智能体中的有效性；其跨任务零迁移能力与编译执行带来的成本优势表明该框架具有良好的泛化性和实用性，为Agent Skills的自动化优化提供了新范式。

title: DAPM: UAV Monocular Depth Estimation from Any Height, Pitch, Roll and FOV
summary: Monocular depth estimation is a fundamental prerequisite for 3D reconstruction and autonomous navigation in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). In practical deployments, UAVs operate under highly dynamic camera poses characterized by continuous variations in height, pitch, roll, and field of view (FOV). Existing monocular depth estimation methods frequently fail to generalize across such diverse perspectives and the expansive scale of depth distributions inherent in aerial scenes. To address these challenges, we establish a quantitative representation of UAV viewing angles through rigorous theoretical analysis, deriving the geometric correspondence between viewing angles and view distances using the ground plane as a reference for observation. Building upon this, we propose Depth Estimation for Any Perspectives Model (DAPM), representing the first monocular framework specifically designed for UAV aerial imagery to jointly estimate camera pose and depth under continuously varying viewpoints. Specifically, we introduce an Ideal Ground Depth (IGD) module that leverages the derived geometric relationships between UAV perspectives and view distances to implement dense camera-pose supervision and enhance depth features. And we further develop a coarse-to-fine Progressive Quantization Bins (PQB) module. By incorporating progressive supervision and hierarchical quantization bins, the PQB module enables robust estimation in complex UAV aerial imagery. To evaluate the proposed framework, we present the UAV Any Perspectives Depth (UAPD) dataset, featuring comprehensive and continuous distributions of pose parameters. Experimental results on UAPD demonstrate that DAPM achieves state-of-the-art performance across both depth and camera-pose estimation metrics. The source code and datasets are available at: https://github.com/ThisIsLT/DAPM.

AI.tldr: 提出DAPM，首个面向无人机航拍图像的联合估计相机位姿与深度的单目框架，通过理想地面深度（IGD）模块利用几何关系实现密集位姿监督，并结合渐进式量化箱（PQB）模块实现粗到细的深度估计，在自建UAPD数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法难以泛化到无人机在高度、俯仰角、翻滚角和视场角等高度动态相机位姿下的航拍场景，且缺乏针对不断变化视角和广阔深度分布范围的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立无人机视角与视距之间的几何对应关系，以此为基础提出DAPM框架：引入理想地面深度（IGD）模块，利用几何关系实现密集的相机位姿监督并增强深度特征；设计渐进式量化箱（PQB）模块，通过渐进式监督和分层量化箱实现粗到细的深度估计，实现无人机航拍复杂场景下的鲁棒深度预测。
AI.result: 在自建的UAPD数据集上，DAPM在深度估计和相机位姿估计两个任务指标上均达到最先进水平，验证了联合估计框架在无人机连续变化视角下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是首个专门针对无人机航拍图像、在连续变化视角下联合估计相机位姿与深度的单目框架，为无人机自主导航和三维重建提供了更通用和鲁棒的基础支持。

title: Future Rendering $\neq$ Future Surface: A Benchmark and Dataset for Dynamic Surface Reconstruction Beyond the Observed Window
summary: Dynamic-scene reconstruction is almost always evaluated inside the observed time window, yet deployment settings such as AR overlays, robot interaction, and anticipatory planning need the future surface: the geometry at times beyond those captured. No standard benchmark measures this. We introduce FutureSurf, a controlled diagnostic benchmark and dataset for future-time surface reconstruction that trades scene diversity for exact future ground truth and falsification controls. A method trains on the observed first 75% of a sequence; we score its extracted per-frame surface on the held-out future by Chamfer distance, reporting absolute future CD as the primary score and the future/observed gap as a diagnostic. The dataset contains eight analytically defined controlled motions, including three falsification controls, with exact per-frame ground-truth meshes. We also provide a ground-truth-side recoverability oracle. The release includes split files, scoring code, a benchmark card, and Croissant metadata. On the controlled motions, the DG-Mesh backbone leaves a 2.7-4.1$\times$ gap even for futures predictable in principle (four of five recoverable from observed motion by a fixed rule), while the falsification controls behave as designed (the surface-invariant motion shows no gap). Beyond the contributed dataset, the gap persists across six animated DG-Mesh asset scenes and a second backbone, Deformable-3DGS (2.0-6.6$\times$; both share a deformation-MLP temporal model). The benchmark also shows that future rendering quality and future-surface accuracy are statistically decoupled, so the novel-view-synthesis metrics the field reports do not track future geometry. The future error is structured, concentrating where the surface moves. The dataset, evaluation toolkit, and scoring code are available on Hugging Face and GitHub (https://github.com/Ricky-S/futuresurf).

AI.tldr: FutureSurf is a benchmark and dataset for evaluating future-time surface reconstruction, showing that current dynamic-scene reconstruction methods (DG-Mesh, Deformable-3DGS) exhibit a 2.0–6.6× gap in future geometry accuracy compared to observed frames, and that novel-view-synthesis metrics do not track future surface quality.
AI.motivation: Dynamic-scene reconstruction is almost always evaluated only within the observed time window, yet real-world deployment scenarios such as AR overlays, robot interaction, and anticipatory planning require accurate future surface geometry beyond captured frames; no standard benchmark exists to measure this capability.
AI.method: The paper introduces FutureSurf, a controlled diagnostic benchmark containing eight analytically defined controlled motions (including three falsification controls) with exact per-frame ground-truth meshes, a recoverability oracle, and scoring code. Methods are trained on the first 75% of a sequence and evaluated on held-out future frames using Chamfer distance as the primary metric, reporting both absolute future CD and the future/observed gap.
AI.result: On controlled motions, DG-Mesh shows a 2.7–4.1× future/observed gap even for futures predictable in principle, while falsification controls behave as designed (surface-invariant motion shows no gap). The gap persists across six animated DG-Mesh asset scenes and Deformable-3DGS (2.0–6.6×; both share a deformation-MLP temporal model). Furthermore, future rendering quality and future-surface accuracy are statistically decoupled, meaning novel-view-synthesis metrics do not track future geometry.
AI.conclusion: Current dynamic-scene reconstruction methods significantly underperform on future surface prediction despite sharing temporal deformation models, and the standard evaluation practice of reporting rendering metrics fails to capture future geometry accuracy. The future error is structured and concentrates where the surface moves, highlighting the need for dedicated future-surface evaluation benchmarks like FutureSurf.

title: AttriMem: Attribution-Guided Process Feedback for Agent Memory Learning
summary: Effective memory is crucial for LLM agents, yet constructing it effectively remains challenging. A memory-construction policy decides what information to extract, store, update, compress, or discard as interactions accumulate. Heuristic memory methods rely on subjective, task-specific rules, which can misalign with downstream objectives and limit cross-task adaptability. RL-based methods, by contrast, learn from task feedback but mainly use outcome- or module-level rewards. These coarse signals indicate task success but cannot identify which intermediate memory contents support the final answer, creating a fine-grained credit-assignment bottleneck. However, constructing such process feedback is prohibitively difficult because intermediate memory decisions lack unique ground-truth targets, while the appropriate credit varies with the agent's uncertain reasoning trajectory and therefore cannot be specified in advance. We propose AttriMem, an attribution-guided process-feedback framework for learning memory-construction policies with RL. AttriMem augments the global outcome reward with local rewards derived from token-level contributions to the final answer. Experiments on long-horizon dialogue question answering show that AttriMem outperforms retrieval-based, heuristic, and RL-based baselines, generalizes across benchmarks and answer models, stabilizes RL optimization.

AI.tldr: AttriMem提出了一种基于归因引导的过程反馈框架，通过将全局结果奖励与token级贡献的局部奖励相结合，从任务反馈中学习LLM代理的记忆构建策略，在长程对话问答任务中优于检索式、启发式和基于强化学习的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理的记忆构建方法存在根本性缺陷：启发式方法依赖主观且任务特定的规则，难以与下游目标对齐且跨任务适应性差；基于强化学习的方法虽能从任务反馈中学习，但主要使用结果级或模块级粗粒度奖励，无法识别哪些中间记忆内容支撑了最终答案，形成细粒度信用分配瓶颈。直接构造过程反馈极为困难，因为中间记忆决策缺乏唯一真实目标，且适当的信用分配随代理不确定的推理轨迹而变化，无法预先指定。
AI.method: AttriMem是一个归因引导的过程反馈框架，用于通过强化学习学习记忆构建策略。该方法用来自token级对最终答案贡献的局部奖励来增强全局结果奖励，从而实现更细粒度的过程级信用分配，克服了粗粒度奖励信号带来的瓶颈问题。
AI.result: 在长程对话问答任务上的实验表明，AttriMem在性能上优于检索式、启发式以及基于强化学习的基线方法，能够跨基准测试和答案模型进行泛化，并且稳定了强化学习的优化过程。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过归因引导的过程反馈可以有效解决记忆构建策略学习中的细粒度信用分配问题，为LLM代理的长期交互记忆管理提供了一种可泛化且优化稳定的解决方案。

title: Boosting Robustness for All-Weather Self-Supervised Depth Estimation in Autonomous Driving
summary: Self-supervised depth estimation is challenging for safe autonomous driving under various adverse weather conditions due to sensor perception degradation. These challenges arise from two main aspects. Firstly, adverse conditions can distort pixel correspondences and violate the assumptions embedded in the self-supervised loss function, leading to erroneous depth predictions. Secondly, while radar is a widely adopted sensor in adverse weather conditions, the sparse distribution of radar points in the Point of View (POV) poses challenges for self-supervised fusion. To address these issues, we introduce a novel self-training pipeline using unpaired real all-weather data through multi-teacher distillation and robust radar fusion. We propose the Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Teacher Distillation method to generate diverse teacher models with different adverse condition inputs, and then employ uncertainty modeling to weigh the knowledge distillation loss. Additionally, we design the POV-BEV Radar Fusion approach, which leverages camera-pixel ray constraints to establish connections between the camera's Point of View (POV) and the radar's Bird's-Eye View (BEV). This approach enables the utilization of denser radar points, effectively capturing the complementary perspectives of both POV and BEV. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate the robustness of our proposed method on all-weather datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/MICLAB-BUPT/RobustDepth.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多教师蒸馏和鲁棒雷达融合的自训练框架，用于在恶劣天气条件下实现自监督深度估计，通过不确定性建模和POV-BEV雷达融合方法，在跨天气数据集上取得了最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督深度估计方法在恶劣天气条件下面临两大挑战：一是天气导致的像素对应关系扭曲破坏了自监督损失函数的假设，产生错误的深度预测；二是雷达虽在恶劣天气中被广泛使用，但其POV视角下的稀疏点云分布使得自监督融合困难，亟需一种能够有效融合雷达信息并在全天气条件下鲁棒工作的深度估计方法。
AI.method: 本文提出不确定性感知多教师蒸馏方法，生成多个针对不同恶劣条件输入的教师模型，并通过不确定性建模对知识蒸馏损失进行加权；同时设计了POV-BEV雷达融合方法，利用相机-像素射线约束建立相机POV与雷达BEV之间的关联，从而利用更密集的雷达点云，捕获两种视角的互补信息。
AI.result: 在跨天气数据集上的大量定量和定性实验表明，所提方法在所有天气条件下均展现出强大的鲁棒性，达到了最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了通过多教师蒸馏与POV-BEV雷达融合相结合的自训练策略，能够有效克服恶劣天气下自监督深度估计中的像素失真和雷达稀疏问题，为自动驾驶在全天候场景下的可靠感知提供了可行方案。

title: V-DEAL: Diagnosing Video Safety De-Calibration as an Understanding-Refusal Coupling Failure
summary: As Video Large Language Models are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, ensuring their safety alignment has become critical. Counterintuitively, we find that harmful videos paired with benign queries achieve higher attack success rates than the same videos paired with explicitly harmful queries. To understand the underlying mechanism of this vulnerability, we present V-DEAL, a three-level diagnostic framework that jointly analyzes this failure across model behaviour, understanding, and internal representations. By progressively ruling out perception failure and quantifying the model's internal refusal tendency, V-DEAL provides a new diagnostic perspective for analyzing the underlying mechanism of the observed vulnerability. We tested six Video LLMs on three public benchmarks and observed that models correctly recognize harmful video content with over 81\% accuracy, yet the average attack success rate still reaches 48.33\% under the condition pairing harmful videos with benign queries. Hidden-state analysis further shows that visual understanding activates a weaker refusal tendency than textual understanding. Furthermore, we introduce a prompt injection intervention method that reduces attack success rates by an average of 48.24 percentage points and achieves performance comparable to prior fine-tuning-based methods, providing an effective and practical means to address such safety risks in Video LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了视频大语言模型在安全对齐中的一个反直觉漏洞：有害视频搭配良性查询比搭配显式有害查询具有更高的攻击成功率，并提出了V-DEAL诊断框架与提示注入干预方法，有效缓解了这一安全风险。
AI.motivation: 随着视频大语言模型在实际场景中的广泛部署，其安全对齐问题变得至关重要。研究发现一个反直觉的漏洞——有害视频与良性查询配对时攻击成功率反而高于与显式有害查询配对的情况，现有方法缺乏对这一漏洞背后机制的深入理解与系统诊断。
AI.method: 提出V-DEAL三层次诊断框架，从模型行为、语义理解与内部表征三个层面联合分析安全失败机制；通过逐步排除感知失败并量化模型内部拒绝倾向，揭示漏洞根源；进一步提出一种提示注入干预方法，无需微调即可缓解安全风险。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准上对六个视频大语言模型进行测试，结果表明模型正确识别有害视频内容的准确率超过81%，但在有害视频搭配良性查询的条件下平均攻击成功率达48.33%；隐状态分析显示视觉理解激活的拒绝倾向弱于文本理解；所提提示注入干预方法将攻击成功率平均降低48.24个百分点，性能与先前基于微调的方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了视频大语言模型在多模态安全对齐中的关键漏洞，即视觉与文本模态在触发拒绝机制上存在不对称性；V-DEAL框架为理解此类安全失败提供了新的诊断视角，提示注入干预方法则为实际部署提供了轻量级且有效的安全防护方案。

title: UnDA: Unpaired Domain Alignment for Cross-Modal Knowledge Transfer in Medical Imaging
summary: Multimodal based approaches often outperform single modality approaches in downstream tasks as the different modalities provide complementary information, yet acquiring paired clinical data remains a significant challenge in real world scenarios. While cross-modal knowledge distillation addresses this, existing methods often struggle with large modality gaps and the propagation of noise from uncertain source-domain predictions. To overcome these challenges, we propose UnDA, an anchor-guided framework for unpaired cross-modal distillation. Our approach introduces a backbone-agnostic Alignment Module that extracts semantically structured class tokens via an attention based pooling mechanism. To ensure robust knowledge transfer, we propose Uncertainty-Weighted Optimal Transport (UCT-OT), which dynamically weights feature-level alignment based on prediction confidence, effectively suppressing noisy supervision. Furthermore, a per-class ProtoNCE objective maintains stable prototype memories to enforce global discriminability across unpaired batches. Evaluations on representative segmentation tasks under strictly unpaired settings show consistent improvements in accuracy and boundary precision in the target modality, demonstrating that meaningful structural knowledge can be transferred across heterogeneous data sources without paired datasets.

AI.tldr: UnDA提出了一种基于锚点的无配对跨模态知识蒸馏框架，通过语义对齐模块、不确定性加权最优传输和原型对比学习，在无配对数据条件下实现跨模态语义分割任务的结构知识迁移，显著提升了目标模态的精度和边界质量。
AI.motivation: 多模态方法虽能利用互补信息提升下游任务性能，但获取配对的临床多模态数据在实际场景中困难重重；现有跨模态知识蒸馏方法在面对较大模态间隙时性能不佳，且容易受到源域预测中不确定噪声的传播影响。
AI.method: 提出UnDA框架，核心包括三个组件：一是与骨干网络无关的对齐模块，通过基于注意力池化机制提取语义上有结构的类别令牌；二是不确定性加权最优传输（UCT-OT），根据预测置信度动态调整特征级对齐权重以抑制噪声监督；三是每类ProtoNCE目标函数，维护稳定的原型记忆以在无配对批次间保持全局判别性。
AI.result: 在严格无配对设定下的代表性语义分割任务评估中，UnDA在目标模态上持续提升了分割精度和边界精确度，验证了无需配对数据集即可在异构数据源之间有效迁移结构性知识。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过显式建模语义结构、不确定性感知对齐和全局原型约束，可以在完全无配对条件下实现跨模态结构知识的有效迁移，为临床场景中缺乏配对多模态数据的问题提供了可行方案。

authors: Elderly People with Frailty or Dementia Azul Debenedetti
title: SafeStep: AI-powered Travel Assistance for Elderly People with Frailty or Dementia
summary: More than a million people in the UK suffer from frailty or dementia, which severely compromise their ability to travel in urban environments. This paper presents SafeStep, an AI-driven travel system that assists elderly users with their journeys. At the core of SafeStep is a novel travel graph representation, which integrates route planning with predictive modelling. For each stage of a journey, the system (i) generates personalized failure scenarios using a combi-nation of LLMs and the Anticip8 behavioral prediction engine, (ii) proposes targeted interventions, and (iii) estimates the impact of interventions on out-come probabilities. This enables SafeStep to select interventions that maximize the likelihood of the person reaching their destination. SafeStep was evaluated through experiments on travel graph generation and a field study involving 26 real-world journeys. Results showed that combining Anticip8 for failure pre-diction with GPT-based models for intervention evaluation yields the most re-liable performance. User feedback indicated that SafeStep improves confidence and perceived safety during travel, although interface usability needs to be im-proved for the target demographic. In the future, we would like to improve and release SafeStep. The AI system that was developed for SafeStep could be ap-plied in other areas, such as mental health, career coaching and addiction treatment.

AI.tldr: SafeStep 是一个 AI 驱动的出行辅助系统，通过结合大语言模型与行为预测引擎 Anticip8，生成个性化故障场景并评估干预措施效果，为患有虚弱或痴呆的老年用户选择最优干预方案以最大化行程成功概率。实验表明该组合策略性能最优，用户反馈显示其提升了出行信心和安全感。
AI.motivation: 英国超过百万的虚弱或痴呆老年群体的城市出行能力严重受限，现有出行辅助系统缺乏针对该人群的个性化故障预测与干预机制，无法有效应对行程中可能发生的各类突发状况。
AI.method: SafeStep 提出了一种新颖的出行图表示方法，将路径规划与预测建模相集成。系统为行程的每个阶段执行三个核心步骤：(i) 利用大语言模型与 Anticip8 行为预测引擎组合生成个性化故障场景，(ii) 提出针对性的干预措施，(iii) 估计干预措施对结果概率的影响，从而选择能最大化出行者到达目的地可能性的最优干预方案。
AI.result: 通过出行图生成实验和包含 26 次真实出行经历的现场研究，结果表明将 Anticip8 用于故障预测与 GPT 模型用于干预评估的组合策略取得了最可靠的性能。用户反馈显示 SafeStep 提升了老年用户在出行过程中的信心和感知安全性，但目标人群的用户界面可用性仍有待改进。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了将预测模型与大语言模型相结合用于个性化出行干预的有效性，为面向脆弱群体的智能辅助系统设计提供了实证依据。未来工作包括改进并公开发布 SafeStep，其 AI 框架可推广至心理健康、职业辅导和成瘾治疗等其他领域。

title: Self-Supervised Learning of Structured Dynamics from Videos
summary: Understanding motion in video is a fundamental challenge for visual learning, as frame-to-frame change entangles two sources of dynamics: camera motion and object motion. This decomposition has remained underexplored in representation learning, partly because these factors are tightly coupled in natural videos and difficult to supervise separately. Yet recovering it is important for learning robust motion representations that separate meaningful object dynamics from camera-induced variation.
