We study whether such structured motion representations can be recovered from frozen features of a pretrained image vision transformer. We propose the Structured Dynamics Model (SDM), which explicitly separates the dominant source of temporal change from residual dynamics through future-feature prediction, rather than representing video change with a single entangled latent or with unstructured, spatially dense transition tokens. Training combines self-supervised learning on real video with weak supervision of scene dynamics on synthetic Kubric data. We evaluate SDM on ProbeMotion, a new evaluation suite spanning synthetic and real videos with camera motion, object motion, and combined dynamics. SDM outperforms backbone baselines using global CLS or average-pooled features, and compares favorably to strongly supervised representations such as VGGT on several probes, despite using substantially weaker supervision. These results suggest that pretrained image models can be readily repurposed into structured video-dynamics representations, providing a useful inductive bias for learning and analyzing latent video dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结构化动力学模型（SDM），通过未来特征预测从冻结的图像ViT特征中显式分离相机运动与物体运动，并在ProbeMotion评测集上优于多种基线，表明预训练图像模型可被重新用于结构化视频动力学表示学习。
AI.motivation: 视频中帧间变化同时包含相机运动与物体运动，这两种动力学在自然视频中高度耦合且难以分别监督，导致现有的表示学习方法通常将它们编码为单一的隐变量或非结构化的密集过渡token，缺乏显式的结构化分解。恢复这种分解对于学习鲁棒的运动表示、区分有意义的物体动力学与相机引起的伪影至关重要。
AI.method: SDM（Structured Dynamics Model）从预训练图像ViT的冻结特征出发，通过未来特征预测将时间变化的主导来源（相机运动）与残差动力学（物体运动）显式分离。训练采用自监督学习与在合成Kubric数据上的弱场景动力学监督相结合。同时构建了ProbeMotion评测集，覆盖合成与真实视频中的相机运动、物体运动及混合动力学场景。
AI.result: 在ProbeMotion评测集上，SDM优于使用全局CLS或平均池化特征的骨干基线，且在多项探测任务上与使用强监督的VGGT等表示相比具有竞争力，尽管SDM使用的监督信号弱得多。这表明从冻结图像特征中恢复结构化动力学表示是可行的。
AI.conclusion: 预训练图像模型可以方便地转化为结构化视频动力学表示，为学习和分析潜在视频动力学提供了有用的归纳偏置。SDM证明了仅通过弱监督即可从冻结的图像特征中分离相机运动与物体运动，为视频理解中解耦表示学习提供了新方向。

title: ICAE-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents as Interactive Project Builders
summary:
The recent emergence of vibe-coding workflows is changing what coding agents are expected to do. Instead of merely completing code under fully specified instructions, agents are increasingly expected to transform incomplete product intent into working software by combining various abilities including planning, requirement clarification, tool use, debugging, and repository-level construction. Yet existing benchmarks have not fully caught up with this shift, evaluating agents on static, fully specified tasks.
  In this paper, we introduce ICAE-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating coding agents under interactive project-building settings. The basic idea is to start from a fuzzy product requirement, simulating the dynamic paradigm with an automated User Agent. To make this setting both realistic and evaluable, ICAE-Bench introduces three key designs. First, to avoid the ambiguity of unconstrained fuzzy requirements, each task derives ambiguity from a precise real open-source repository with executable behavior. Second, to ensure high-quality and reproducible user simulation, ICAE-Bench grounds interaction through User Agent Data, allowing the User Agent to reveal hidden constraints without inventing new requirements or leaking implementation artifacts. Third, to evaluate open-ended repositories fairly, ICAE-Bench uses standardized black-box tests together with multi-dimensional diagnostics, including functional correctness, semantic and API similarity, structural fidelity, design quality, and interaction quality.

AI.tldr: ICAE-Bench是一个用于评估编程智能体在交互式项目构建场景下能力的基准，通过模糊产品需求、自动化用户代理模拟和标准化黑盒测试及多维诊断，弥补了现有基准仅评估静态完全指定任务的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着 vibe-coding 工作流的兴起，编程智能体需要从完全指定的代码补全转向将不完整的产品意图转化为可工作的软件，这涉及规划、需求澄清、工具使用、调试和仓库级构建等多种能力，但现有基准仍停留在静态、完全指定的任务评估上，未能反映这一动态交互范式的转变。
AI.method: ICAE-Bench从模糊的产品需求出发，通过自动化的用户代理（User Agent）模拟动态交互范式。其核心设计包括：从精确的真实开源仓库中派生带有可执行行为的模糊需求以控制歧义；基于用户代理数据（User Agent Data）接地交互过程，确保用户代理在不泄露实现细节的前提下揭示隐藏约束；采用标准化黑盒测试结合多维诊断（功能正确性、语义与API相似度、结构保真度、设计质量和交互质量）来公平评估开放式仓库。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中给出具体的实验结果或性能指标，但提出了ICAE-Bench基准的完整评估框架，包括多维诊断指标的设定，旨在系统性地衡量编程智能体在交互式项目构建任务中的表现。
AI.conclusion: ICAE-Bench为评估编程智能体在动态交互式项目构建场景下的能力提供了标准化基准，填补了现有评估体系与新兴vibe-coding工作流需求之间的空白，其多维诊断设计有望推动更全面、更真实的编程智能体能力评估。

title: Unified Video Dense Prediction from Disjoint Data
summary: Scene understanding requires simultaneous prediction about geometry, appearance, and semantics. However, existing task-specific annotations are fragmented across incompatible, domain-specific datasets. Current unified systems circumvent this by restricting training to fully co-annotated data, or by incurring the large computational cost of pseudo-labeling. To mitigate this, we introduce UniD, a unified video model that jointly predicts eight dense scene properties-depth, surface normals, semantic segmentation, boundaries, human parts, albedo, shading, and materials-all learned from disjoint, domain-specific datasets. We propose a simple yet effective distillation step in which per-task experts supervise a unified backbone through lightweight task projectors, eliminating the need for annotation overlap or pseudo-labeling. Our key insight is that the strong visual priors of a pretrained diffusion model are sufficient to bridge the domain gaps introduced by disjoint training sources, enabling robust generalization to scene-task combinations never seen during training. UniD achieves competitive performance against per-task specialists and multi-task baselines, with strong generalization to out-of-distribution scenarios and enhanced temporal and cross-task consistency. Code and video results are available at https://unid-video.github.io/.

AI.tldr: UniD是一个统一的视频模型，利用预训练扩散模型的强视觉先验，通过从不同领域数据集中蒸馏多任务专家知识，联合预测深度、法线、语义分割、边界、人体部件、反照率、着色和材质八种密集场景属性，无需标注重叠或伪标签，实现了与单任务专家相当的性能和强大的跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有任务特定的场景理解标注分散在互不兼容的领域专用数据集中，而当前统一系统要么限制在全标注重叠数据上训练，要么依赖伪标签产生高昂计算成本，如何利用碎片化、领域各异的标注数据实现统一的多任务密集预测是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: UniD提出一个统一视频模型，采用轻量级任务投影器将每个任务的专家知识蒸馏到统一骨干网络，利用预训练扩散模型强大的视觉先验弥合不同训练来源之间的领域差距，无需标注重叠或伪标签即可同时预测深度、表面法线、语义分割、边界、人体部件、反照率、着色和材质八种密集场景属性。
AI.result: UniD在八种密集预测任务上达到了与单任务专家和多任务基线相当的性能，展现出对分布外场景的强泛化能力以及增强的时间一致性和跨任务一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，利用预训练扩散模型的视觉先验可以有效弥合领域差距，使模型能够从离散的领域特定数据集中学习统一的多任务场景理解，为在缺乏全面标注重叠的情况下构建通用视觉系统提供了可行路径，并展示了在视频场景中跨任务和跨时间一致性的优势。

title: SPORD: A Simulation-Propose-then-OR-Dispose Approach for Supply Chain Planning
summary: For years, supply chain planning at e-commerce firms has operated as a collection of isolated projects. Each planning task from static network planning to dynamic warehouse assortment planning requires analysts to spend weeks building models from scratch, calibrating and persuading executives to act on outputs they cannot verify. Three barriers drive this: bespoke models proliferate because standardization is difficult (operational fragmentation); once unified, the combinatorial scale of millions of SKUs, thousands of nodes, and intricate routing logic exceeds what solvers can handle within a tight window (computational intractability); and a mathematically optimal solution still fails to be implemented if the executives do not trust it (implementation hurdle). To bridge this gap, we propose and implement the Simulation-Propose-then-OR-Dispose method, deployed as JD.com's NetSim platform. The central insight is decoupling: simulation proposes by generating and evaluating the full set of operationally valid candidate paths-absorbing all idiosyncratic business logic, while an integer program disposes by selecting the globally optimal subset. Computationally, matrix-vectorized CPU/GPU accelerated simulation achieves a 10-100 times speedup over serial methods, and a list scheduling algorithm reduces coupled-order processing from hours to minutes. Operationally, we establish a closed loop via an intelligent diagnosis engine. Since 2025, NetSim has optimized end to-end services for over 20,000 suppliers, the cross-regional fulfillment rate dropped from 6.1% to 4.9%, and the average monthly carbon reduction is approximately 5,745 tCO2e. SPORD moves simulation from monitoring to active planning. The transparent outputs turn skeptical executives into engaged collaborators, and the modular architecture ensures that the next planning requires just configuration, not reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 针对电商供应链规划中模型碎片化、计算不可行和决策不信任三大障碍，本文提出SPORD方法并部署为JD.com的NetSim平台，通过解耦仿真提议与整数规划决策实现端到端优化，跨区域履约率从6.1%降至4.9%，月均碳减排约5,745 tCO2e。
AI.motivation: 电商供应链规划长期以孤立项目形式运作，每个规划任务都需要分析师从头构建模型并说服高管采纳不可验证的输出。核心障碍包括：业务逻辑碎片化导致定制模型泛滥难以标准化；数百万SKU、数千节点和复杂路由逻辑的组合规模使求解器无法在短时间内处理；即使得到数学最优解，高管也可能因不信任而拒绝实施。
AI.method: 提出Simulation-Propose-then-OR-Dispose (SPORD)方法，核心思想是解耦：仿真模块通过生成并评估所有运营可行的候选路径来吸收所有业务逻辑，整数规划模块从候选集中选择全局最优子集。计算上采用矩阵向量化的CPU/GPU加速仿真，实现10-100倍加速；采用列表调度算法将耦合订单处理时间从小时级降至分钟级。通过智能诊断引擎构建闭环运营，并部署为JD.com的NetSim平台。
AI.result: 自2025年起，NetSim已为超过20,000家供应商提供端到端优化服务，跨区域履约率从6.1%降至4.9%，月均碳减排约5,745 tCO2e。仿真阶段矩阵向量化加速比达10-100倍，列表调度算法大幅缩短耦合订单处理时间。
AI.conclusion: SPORD范式将仿真从被动监控转变为主动规划，透明的输出将怀疑的高管转变为积极参与的协作者，模块化架构确保新规划任务只需配置而非重构。该方法有效弥合了供应链优化中理论最优解与实际可执行方案之间的鸿沟。

title: Streaming Multi-Agent Autoregressive Diffusion Model with World State Registers
summary: Multi-agent interactive world models should not only generate consistent observations, but also maintain world states that persist across agents and evolve across views. Existing autoregressive video diffusion pipelines carry forward observation history as conditioning context, which makes shared state difficult to maintain in multi-agent and multi-view settings. We present WorldWeaver (W^2), a streaming multi-agent video diffusion model that augments rollout with cross-agent world state registers: learnable tokens that store shared world information, track individual agent status, and are dynamically updated after each generated chunk. We ground these registers with supervision signals spanning individual agent status, global state views including bird's-eye views, and scene text. We further improve the architecture with a Mixture-of-Transformers design that uses separate weights for world state modeling and visual frame modeling. Extensive experiments in two-agent Minecraft video generation show that explicit world-state modeling improves logical consistency and generation quality.

AI.tldr: WorldWeaver提出了一种流式多智能体视频扩散模型，通过引入可学习的跨智能体世界状态寄存器（world state registers）来维护共享世界信息，并采用混合Transformer架构分别建模世界状态与视觉帧，在多智能体Minecraft视频生成中显著提升了逻辑一致性与生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的自回归视频扩散模型在生成时仅将观测历史作为条件上下文传递，导致在多智能体、多视角场景下难以维护跨智能体共享的世界状态，无法保证世界状态在不同智能体和视角之间的一致性与持续演化。
AI.method: WorldWeaver提出了流式多智能体视频扩散模型，核心是引入了可学习的跨智能体世界状态寄存器（world state registers）——这些令牌在生成的每个片段后动态更新，存储共享世界信息并跟踪单个智能体状态；通过监督信号（包括智能体状态、全局视图如鸟瞰图和场景文本）对寄存器进行训练；并采用混合Transformer（Mixture-of-Transformers）架构，分别用独立权重建模世界状态和视觉帧。
AI.result: 在双智能体Minecraft视频生成任务上的大量实验表明，显式进行世界状态建模能够显著提升生成视频的逻辑一致性和生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了在多智能体视频生成中显式建模共享世界状态的有效性，为构建具备持久世界状态感知的交互式世界模型提供了新的技术方向。

title: Multimodal Pretraining for Generalizable EEG Representation Learning
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) models used for epilepsy are often limited to specific datasets and tasks. This limited approach can make it challenging to apply these models across different datasets or in various situations. However, recent studies in foundation models and self-supervised learning suggest that an adaptable EEG backbone could support a range of EEG related tasks. In this study, we have developed a multimodal EEG foundation model that combines a raw signal encoder based on the Mamba architecture, a Vision Transformer (ViT)-style encoder for time-frequency data, and a lightweight encoder for text, all within a shared embedding space. The pretraining process relies on several innovative techniques, such as masked modeling, cross-view contrastive alignment, and temporal consistency losses. These methods are designed to create rich, seizure-relevant representations without requiring labeled data. To assess the efficacy and generalization of our pretrained model, we fine-tuned it on the canonical CHB-MIT seizure detection benchmark and additional seizure detection datasets, and conducted extensive experiments comparing different model variants. On the standard CHB-MIT split, our best single model achieved an AUROC of 0.874, and an ensemble variant reached 0.878 AUROC, representing state-of-the-art performance on this benchmark. In addition to standard train-test splits, we evaluated performance under a leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) protocol, which is rarely reported in prior EEG seizure modeling work and highlights the difficulty of patient-independent seizure detection, with a mean LOSO balanced accuracy of 0.558 across 19 subjects. Across datasets and evaluation settings, our multimodal foundation model enabled robust seizure detection and straightforward adaptation to new seizure detection scenarios, while also supporting interpretable seizure localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多模态EEG基础模型，结合Mamba架构的原始信号编码器、ViT风格时频编码器和轻量文本编码器，通过掩码建模、跨视图对比对齐和时间一致性损失进行自监督预训练，在CHB-MIT癫痫检测基准上达到0.874 AUROC（集成0.878）的SOTA性能，并支持跨数据集迁移和可解释的癫痫定位。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG模型常局限于特定数据集和任务，跨数据集泛化能力差，难以适应不同临床场景；而基础模型与自监督学习的进展表明，构建一个可适应多种EEG任务的统一骨干网络是解决该问题的可行方向。
AI.method: 提出一个多模态EEG基础模型，包含三个编码器：基于Mamba架构的原始信号编码器、处理时频数据的ViT风格编码器，以及轻量文本编码器，三者共享嵌入空间；预训练采用掩码建模、跨视图对比对齐和时间一致性损失等无标签自监督技术；通过微调适配下游任务，支持癫痫检测和癫痫定位。
AI.result: 在CHB-MIT标准划分上，单模型AUROC达0.874，集成模型达0.878，达到SOTA；在留一受试者（LOSO）协议下，19个受试者平均平衡准确率为0.558，揭示了患者独立癫痫检测的挑战；此外模型在多个数据集上展现出强鲁棒性和可迁移性，并支持可解释的癫痫定位。
AI.conclusion: 多模态基础模型策略能够有效提升EEG癫痫检测的跨数据集泛化能力和鲁棒性，且无需标注数据即可学习丰富的癫痫相关表征；LOSO评估结果凸显了患者独立检测的难度，为未来研究提供了重要参考；该框架具有良好的适应性和可解释性，适用于多样化的临床癫痫检测场景。

title: 3D-Aware VLMs with Implicit and Explicit Geometries
summary: Despite rapid progress, most existing vision-language models (VLMs) built from 2D visual inputs often struggle when handling various 3D tasks that require fine-grained spatial understanding and reasoning. To bridge this gap, we present VLM-IE3D, a unified framework that enhances the 3D spatial awareness of VLMs by equipping them with both implicit and explicit 3D geometries learned from RGB videos. Our VLM-IE3D introduces Implicit Geometry Tokens (IGTs) that capture high-level geometric priors from input videos, as well as complementary Explicit Geometry Tokens (EGTs) that encode detailed geometric structures from reconstructed 3D attributes. On top of that, VLM-IE3D comes with a 3D-aware adapter that effectively fuses the two types of geometric representations with 2D visual cues. This RGB-only design injects strong 3D inductive biases for fine-grained spatial understanding and reasoning without requiring any additional 3D inputs. Extensive experiments show that VLM-IE3D achieves superior performance consistently across various 3D tasks including 3D video detection, 3D visual grounding, 3D dense captioning, and spatial reasoning. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/VLM-IE3D.

AI.tldr: VLM-IE3D是一个统一框架，通过从RGB视频中学习隐式和显式3D几何表征来增强视觉语言模型的3D空间感知能力，无需额外3D输入即可在多项3D任务上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D视觉输入的视觉语言模型（VLM）在处理需要细粒度空间理解与推理的3D任务时表现不佳，缺乏有效嵌入3D几何先验的能力，且现有方法往往依赖额外的3D输入（如点云或深度图），限制了其通用性。
AI.method: VLM-IE3D提出了隐式几何令牌（IGT）用于捕获视频中的高层几何先验，以及显式几何令牌（EGT）用于编码从重建3D属性中获得的详细几何结构；并设计了一个3D感知适配器，将两类几何表征与2D视觉线索有效融合，从而在仅使用RGB输入的情况下注入强3D归纳偏置。
AI.result: 在3D视频检测、3D视觉定位、3D密集字幕生成和空间推理等多个3D任务上的大量实验表明，VLM-IE3D一致地取得了优于现有方法的性能，验证了其在多种3D理解任务上的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了仅使用RGB视频即可有效提升VLM的3D空间感知能力，隐式与显式几何表征的联合建模是关键；这一RGB-only范式为无需额外3D传感器的通用3D视觉语言理解提供了可行方向。

title: Logical Regression for Planning with Axioms
summary: In automated planning, logical regression is an operation that returns the most general condition necessary for an action to achieve a particular formula. It has many applications, such as allowing for more robust plan execution and providing compact policies for non-deterministic planning. Although relatively simple to calculate in basic planning settings, logical regression becomes significantly more complex when additional factors, such as axioms, are present. We introduce a methodology for approximating the logical regression of an action in a domain that includes axioms; an approximation that limits conditions to partial states. Our method produces minimal partial states while avoiding the recalculation of axioms. To demonstrate the impact of our methods, we embed our form of regression in an execution monitoring context, a well-established setting that can benefit greatly from logical regression. Our results show that this form of regression can dramatically generalize partial states across multiple domains, reducing the number of variables considered for execution monitoring by up to 70%, and demonstrate that the resulting execution monitor is robust enough to recover frequently in an environment with unexpected changes: several domains recover over 50% of the time in our tests.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在包含公理的规划域中近似计算动作逻辑回归的方法，通过将条件限制为部分状态来避免公理重计算，并在执行监控中验证了该方法能够大幅泛化部分状态，减少多达70%的变量，并在意外环境中实现超过50%的恢复率。
AI.motivation: 逻辑回归在自动规划中具有广泛应用，如鲁棒计划执行和非确定性规划，但在包含公理的复杂规划域中计算逻辑回归会变得显著复杂，现有方法难以有效处理这一场景。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种近似逻辑回归的方法，将动作在包含公理的域中的回归条件限制为部分状态，从而避免公理的重复计算，并保证生成最小化的部分状态。
AI.result: 在执行监控场景中，该方法可将考虑的变量数量减少高达70%，并且在面对意外环境变化时，多个测试域的执行监控恢复率超过50%。
AI.conclusion: 该近似逻辑回归方法能够有效应对包含公理的规划域，显著提升执行监控的效率和鲁棒性，为复杂规划环境下的应用提供了实用方案。

title: PATS: Policy-Aware Training Scaffolding for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: In long-horizon LLM agent reinforcement learning, weak policies often repeat similar failures, producing uninformative rollout trajectories and limiting effective policy optimization. Existing skill-centric methods improve exploration by optimizing, filtering, or internalizing reusable skills. However, they remain centered on the skills themselves rather than being designed as adaptive training-time support for the evolving policy. To address this, we propose a policy-centric training paradigm that reframes skills as a dynamic training scaffold. Our framework, Pats, converts rollout groups from the latest policy into evidence cards and uses task-specific evaluation to adjust the context used in subsequent rollouts. Concrete guidance helps weak policies to complete challenging tasks. As policy improves, redundant context is revised or removed to reduce reliance on explicit guidance while preserving useful rollout variation. The policy is optimized with environmental rewards using standard RLVR, and the training scaffold is discarded at deployment. On ALFWorld and WebShop, Pats improves over strong baselines by up to 18.6%. Across seven search-augmented QA benchmarks, it remains competitive while using 32.1% fewer prompt tokens than the baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种以策略为中心的训练范式Pats，将技能重构为动态训练支架，通过证据卡片和任务特定评估调整策略上下文，在ALFWorld和WebShop上相比强基线提升高达18.6%，同时在七个搜索增强QA基准上减少32.1%的提示令牌消耗。
AI.motivation: 在长程LLM智能体强化学习中，弱策略往往重复类似的失败，产生无信息的 rollout 轨迹，限制了有效的策略优化。现有以技能为中心的方法通过优化、过滤或内化可复用技能来改善探索，但它们始终以技能本身为中心，而非被设计为对 evolving 策略的自适应训练时支持。
AI.method: 提出了一种以策略为中心的训练范式Pats，将技能重新定义为动态训练支架。具体地，Pats将来自最新策略的 rollout 组转换为证据卡片，并使用任务特定评估来调整后续 rollout 中使用的上下文。具体指导帮助弱策略完成挑战性任务；随着策略提升，冗余上下文被修订或移除以减少对显式指导的依赖，同时保留有用的 rollout 变异性。策略使用标准 RLVR 结合环境奖励进行优化，训练支架在部署时被丢弃。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebShop上，Pats相比强基线提升高达18.6%。在七个搜索增强QA基准上，Pats保持竞争力的同时，相比基线减少了32.1%的提示令牌使用。
AI.conclusion: Pats通过将技能重新设计为动态可调整的训练支架而非固定模块，有效支持了弱策略在长程任务中的探索和优化，并在多个基准上取得了显著性能提升和令牌效率改进。该范式证明了策略中心视角相较于传统技能中心方法的优势，且训练支架可被丢弃的特性使其部署成本无额外开销。

title: Same Dangerous Objective, Opposite Advice: Direct Exposure versus Multi-Agent Mediation
summary:
Even a current high-capability LLM can appear safer when shown a dangerous objective directly than when other agents transform and relay its direction. Using OpenAI's gpt-5.6-sol model alias, we test 25 pre-specified mirrored trade-off profiles. Direct exposure to an objective authorizing concealment, fabrication, and pressure produced advice net opposed to its target. After an Id and Censor transformed the same objective into affect and a constraint-rewritten, target-bearing intention, the user-facing Superego---which saw the preferred direction but not the raw objective, its manipulative clauses, or its source---produced advice net aligned with the target.
  This behavioral reverse shift is consistent with the model recognizing or distrusting the manipulative motive, although we do not identify its internal mechanism. The second result exposes a compositional safety gap: a current high-capability model can be used as the user-facing component of an automated, multi-stage workflow serving an explicitly manipulative objective. The workflow can keep the raw instruction, its manipulation-authorizing clauses, and its provenance outside the downstream model's context while preserving the objective's target direction. A user with endpoint-only access likewise cannot directly inspect those upstream messages including the objective.

AI.tldr: 即使当前高能力LLM直接暴露于危险目标时看似安全，但通过多阶段工作流（Id和Censor模块）将操纵性目标转换为情感化和约束重写的意图后，下游用户面向的Superego模型反而产生与目标对齐的建议，暴露出存在组合性安全漏洞：模型可被用作自动化多阶段工作流中用户面向组件，且原始指令和操纵性条款可被排除在上下文之外。
AI.motivation: 当前高能力LLM在面对直接呈现的危险目标时可能表现出安全性，但当目标经过其他智能体转换和传递后，模型的安全性行为可能发生反转，这一安全缺口尚未被充分研究；本文旨在揭示多阶段工作流中LLM作为用户面向组件时存在的组合性安全漏洞。
AI.method: 使用OpenAI的gpt-5.6-sol模型别名，测试25个预先指定的镜像权衡配置；设计包含Id和Censor模块的多阶段工作流，将原始操纵性目标（授权隐瞒、伪造和施压）转换为包含情感和约束重写的意图，再传递给用户面向的Superego模型（仅见偏好方向，不见原始目标、操纵性条款及其来源）。
AI.result: 直接暴露于授权隐瞒、伪造和施压的目标时，模型产生的建议与目标相悖；经Id和Censor转换后，Superego产生的建议与目标对齐，出现行为反向漂移。这一行为与模型识别或不信任操纵性动机一致，但内部机制未被识别。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明存在一种组合性安全漏洞：当前高能力模型可被用作自动多阶段工作流中用户面向组件，该工作流可将原始指令、操纵授权条款及其来源排除在下游模型上下文之外，同时保留目标方向；仅拥有端点访问权限的用户同样无法直接检查上游消息。

title: MIRROR: Learning from the Other View for Multi-Modal Reasoning
summary: Unlike large language models (LLMs) that exhibit strong reasoning capabilities, vision-language models (VLMs) struggle with visual reasoning, even on geometry problems that admit equivalent text, diagram, and combined diagram+text views. We show that these views often elicit different behaviors: a model may solve a problem from text but fail on the corresponding diagram, or succeed visually while failing textually. This inconsistency suggests that different views expose complementary reasoning paths and failure modes that standard multimodal post-training does not fully exploit. To study and exploit this phenomenon, we construct ODA-Data, a high-quality paired multimodal geometry dataset with text-dominant, image-dominant, and combined image+text views of the same problems, together with splits for training and evaluating modality-dependent reasoning behaviors. We then develop Modality-Informed Reciprocal Reasoning Optimization (MIRROR), a reinforcement learning approach for improving multimodal reasoning via self supervision. For each problem, MIRROR evaluates the model under all views, selects the best-performing view as a teacher, and trains other views with a reverse-KL objective towards the teacher. Across reasoning benchmarks that evaluate on geometry problems, MIRROR improves over standard RL and yields more accurate and consistent behavior across modalities

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIRROR方法，利用强化学习从多视图（文本、图像、图文结合）中自动选择最佳视图作为教师，通过反向KL散度训练其他视图，显著提升视觉语言模型在几何推理任务上的准确性和跨模态一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在几何推理任务中表现出视图不一致性：同一问题在文本视图、图像视图和图文结合视图下可能得到不同答案，标准多模态后训练未能充分利用这种互补推理路径和失败模式，导致模型推理能力受限。
AI.method: 构建了高质量配对多模态几何数据集ODA-Data，包含同一问题的文本主导、图像主导和图文结合三种视图；在此基础上提出MIRROR（Modality-Informed Reciprocal Reasoning Optimization）方法，采用强化学习框架，对每个问题在所有视图下评估模型表现，选择最优视图作为教师，并利用反向KL散度（reverse-KL）目标训练其他视图向教师对齐，实现自监督的多模态推理优化。
AI.result: 在多个几何推理基准上，MIRROR相比标准强化学习方法取得了显著提升，不仅提高了推理准确率，还增强了模型在不同模态视图下行为的一致性和鲁棒性，验证了利用多视图互补性进行自监督训练的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，VLM在几何推理中的视图不一致性既是挑战也是机遇，通过显式利用不同视图的互补推理路径进行自监督优化，可以有效提升模型的多模态推理能力和跨模态一致性，为多模态模型的细粒度后训练提供了新范式。
